70010000100173.description:
Tale of Dark Lands - a magical fantasy action RPG with an elegant low-poly style and the charm of a timeless fairy tale. Immerse yourself in a world of mysteries, perils, and glorious adventures!

A story full of secrets and challenges.
The main hero is a brave mercenary hired by the residents of a small village to defend them against fierce goblin raids. But what begins as a simple job turns into something far greater. Soon, the hero becomes entwined in an ancient dark tale that threatens the entire land, and only he can stop the encroaching darkness.

Create the hero of your dreams.
A flexible character editor lets you craft a hero with a unique appearance.
Develop your character: earn experience, acquire new skills, and grow stronger with every battle!

Immerse yourself in thrilling gameplay.
Gear and customization: Find or buy unique items – from shining swords to sturdy armor, bows, and magical helmets.
Crafting and upgrades: Gather resources, forge powerful equipment at the village blacksmith, and enhance your gear using runes in the Runic Forge.
Unique skill system: Learn new abilities from the experienced skill trader.
A variety of items: Equipment, artifacts for trade, runes, crafting materials – just make sure everything fits in your grid-based inventory.

Game features:
- Story-driven adventure: A rich yet concise gameplay experience.
- Visual style: Beautiful low-poly design that creates a magical fantasy atmosphere.
- Thoughtful inventory system: A convenient grid-based item storage system.
- Crafting and upgrades: Collect resources and craft gear at the blacksmith.
- Trading and economy: Buy equipment, sell unwanted items, and discover rare finds.
- Hero equipment: A vast selection of gear for your character.
- Character customization: Use the editor to create your unique hero.

Tale of Dark Lands is an epic journey filled with secrets, dangerous foes, and incredible rewards. Become the hero who will face the ancient evil and etch your name into legend!
70010000100173.intro: Magical fantasy action RPG with an elegant low-poly style and the charm of a timeless fairy tale.
70010000100173.name: Tale of Dark Lands

70010000121063.description:
Counter Call - Half Escape Shooter Enter a high-intensity first-person shooter built for nonstop action and fast decision-making. Every mission throws you straight into combat, where quick reflexes, precision aiming, and smart positioning are the only way to survive. Fight through waves of enemies across compact, action-driven maps designed to keep you constantly engaged. 

There’s no downtime — every route leads to new encounters, pushing you to stay alert and react instantly to threats coming from all directions. Adapt your playstyle to each situation. Choose the right weapon, switch tactics on the fly, and handle both close-range aggression and controlled, long-distance combat. Success depends on how well you read the battlefield and respond under pressure. Enjoy smooth controls and responsive mechanics that make movement, aiming, and shooting feel sharp and satisfying. Every encounter is direct, intense, and rewarding for players who think fast and act faster. 

Key Features: 
	•	Fast-paced FPS gameplay with continuous action 
	•	Wave-based enemy encounters
	•	Compact maps designed for constant engagement
	•	Flexible combat styles: aggressive or tactical 
	•	Smooth controls and responsive shooting mechanics 
	•	Increasing challenge that tests reflexes and precision
Step into the zone. Eliminate the threat. Win.
70010000121063.name: Counter Call - Half Escape Shooter

70010000107270.description:
If you're ready to run and play a deadly game of hide-and-seek, then come on in and make yourself at home. Behind the door, endless oppressive corridors, filthy walls, deadly traps, and a ravenous creature eagerly waiting to get up close and personal with you await.

There are doors that should remain locked. There are places that no one should ever visit. Secrets hidden in the shadows should not come to light.

But if you do wander into one of these places, know this: your enemy is strong and dangerous. He plays with your emotions and feelings as he pleases. Run away from there as fast as you can and don't look back. After all, there is no enemy more cruel and insidious than your own past.

Plot:
For several months now, Alex has been having the same nightmare.
He tries to solve the problem on his own, but it leads to nothing. So, the boy decides to ask for help from a professional. But psychologist Dr. Amanda Silk is not Alex's only ally on the thorny path of his hostile consciousness.
A meeting with an old friend is also ahead. Together, they will have to go through many traps and fight monsters to reveal the secrets of the dark past.

Features:
- A grim atmosphere that immerses you in a world of horror and suffering
- Unpredictable events will keep you on edge from the first scene to the last
- Unusual character and monster design
- An original soundtrack and realistic sound effects that create a sense of presence, helping you experience the protagonist's emotions
70010000107270.intro: Are you ready to run and play a deadly game of hide-and-seek?
70010000107270.name: Scarlet Wolf

70010000120877.description:
Springbot: The Last Spark is a side-scrolling action platforming adventure. Traverse a vibrant world by running, jumping and bouncing on springy robotic legs as you try to find gems hidden in mazelike stages. Push crates to reach higher platforms, avoid spike traps, hop on the heads of roving enemies to deactivate them and touch checkpoints to safeguard your progress.

This journey will take you through forests, underground caverns, lofty cliffs and more as you collect coins and explore in colorfully cute HD style across 35 unique levels. Replay cleared stages for better times or to collect more coins, team up for co-op play or put your skills to the test in Glitch Mode!

• Take the role of Springbot as the last remaining hope to restore memory to his fellow robots!
• Enjoy retro side-scrolling adventure through colorful platforming stages.
• Run, jump and bounce on spring-like legs as you traverse mazelike environments!
• Avoid traps and hop on the heads of enemies as you master 35 unique levels.
• Collect gems to power the Great Heart and bring order to a chaotic world!
70010000120877.intro: Embark on a journey to save your fellow robots in colorful side-scrolling style!
70010000120877.name: Springbot: The Last Spark

70010000109775.description:
Begin a majestic journey across vast deserts, towering mountains, and forgotten stone temples. As a vibrant parrot, you glide through sunlit canyons, silent ruins, and sweeping plateaus while staying close to your flock on a long and meaningful migration.
Each handcrafted level guides your flight with 40–60 airy markers drifting between ridges, arches, cliffs, and ancient structures. Wind boosts offer bursts of speed to help you keep pace, while the open landscapes invite you to explore and take in the quiet beauty of the world around you.
The experience stays peaceful throughout—there are no enemies, no dangers, only the challenge of maintaining your rhythm as you navigate through stone corridors and across glowing desert skies. If you collide with anything, you gently return to the last marker and continue your serene flight.
Every flock behaves a little differently, making each run feel unique. Some birds glide swiftly through the canyons, while others move with a slower, more deliberate grace. Whether you’re carving through the air above sand dunes or drifting past ancient monoliths, each moment offers a soothing balance of calm exploration and light challenge.
Let the stone sing beneath your wings as you soar from landmark to landmark, discovering the stories etched into every cliff and ruin along your path.
70010000109775.intro: Stay united with your wandering parrot flock.
70010000109775.name: Sora - Songs of the Stone

70010000111715.description:
Handed the keys to a rundown ranch, it’s up to you to restore your family’s legacy and become an equestrian legend! With the help of a host of colorful characters, you’ll raise charming foals, manage your dream stable of horses, and bring the ranch back to its former glory.

Ride your way — take the reins to feel the thrill and thunder on the racecourse, hone your jumping skills on the Cross Country course, explore the ranch with your horses, and so much more.

RACE AND RIDE TO VICTORY
• Feel all the excitement of the racecourse with realistic, motion-captured animations and dynamic race commentary.
• Race in story mode or online multiplayer in locations inspired by famous race tracks from around the globe.
• Put your jumping skills to the test in Cross Country.

ENJOY THE EQUESTRIAN LIFESTYLE
• Relax and explore gorgeous open locations with your horses, from the ranch to the scenic Swiss Alps.
• Capture stunning images of your horses with the feature-packed Photo Mode.
• Earn and manage resources to upgrade your homestead.

BREED YOUR DREAM HORSES
• Breed adorable foals with unique coats and patterns.
• Craft a legendary lineage with the in-depth genetic breeding system.
• Design your perfect horse with the Horse Creator.
70010000111715.intro: Take the reins and become an equestrian legend!
70010000111715.name: Rival Stars Horse Racing

70010000113590.description:
Sun Wukong, Zhu Bajie, Sha Wujing, and Tang Sanzang!
All of the main characters are Kunio!!
A wild, exhilarating comedy action adventure where they all set out for Tianzhu.

1. A roguelike action game where you grow stronger with each run!
Obtain Secret Skills from gods who randomly appear as you progress through the stages to boost your abilities and stats!
With a whopping 80 different Secret Skills available, discover your ultimate build and mow down the swarms of enemies!

2. Master 3 distinct fighting styles!
You'll start with only the speed-focused Sun Wukong, but as you progress through the story, you'll unlock the power-focused Zhu Bajie and the long-range Sha Wujing!
Freely choose between the three Kunios and utilize their unique traits to conquer each stage!

3. Familiar faces from the River City series join the fray!
Series regulars make their appearances one after another as characters from Journey to the West!
Sometimes they will aid Kunio's crew on their journey, while other times they will stand in your way as bosses...
Don't miss the hilarious banter that unfolds throughout the story!
70010000113590.intro: River City's First Roguelike Built for Solo Play
70010000113590.name: River City Saga: Journey to the West

70010000118389.description:
An ordinary young man is reborn into the world of his favorite comic—only to find himself as a bit-part villain doomed to die. To escape his fate, he must rise as a true villain, gathering allies, defying heroes, and carving a new destiny in this dark fantasy isekai JRPG. Experience a story of survival, betrayal, and ambition where good and evil clash in a pixel-art world.

Fight strategic turn-based battles that blend classic RPG command systems with modern mechanics. Exploit enemy weaknesses, trigger chain attacks, and unleash powerful break attacks. Earn notoriety through misdeeds to rank up and unlock unique arts via a skill tree. Explore dungeons, gather resources, and develop your own evil base with a smithery, lab, smuggling, and more. Packed with pixel-art charm, immersive story, and tactical depth, this parallel world RPG is a must for fans of JRPGs, anime-style games, and fantasy adventures.
70010000118389.intro: Rise as a true villain and carve your own destiny in a dark fantasy RPG!
70010000118389.name: Isekai Villain

70010000119793.description: Smash and break everyone on your way down the slope. There is no time to stop and no time for mercy.  Just charge forward, ignoring all obstacles.
70010000119793.intro: You are a wheel. A truly deadly wheel. No one will be safe in your path.
70010000119793.name: Rolling Wheels

70010000119936.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Anmyeon-eup, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
 high-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery.
70010000119936.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Anmyeon-eup

70010000120848.description:
The 'Crayon' series, responsible for children's creativity worldwide, finally arrives in the most mysterious world, <Crayon Magic World>! In this series, you can meet friends from the Magic World that only existed in imagination, including legendary unicorns, beautiful mermaids, brave dragons, and mysterious nine-tailed foxes.

Unleash your children's imagination with an intuitive interface that anyone can easily enjoy without complicated rules, and a variety of colors that perfectly capture the texture of real crayons. The sight of the fantastic characters you carefully colored coming to life will give children a special sense of accomplishment and a magical experience. Open the door to the Magic World now, the most beautiful digital sketchbook that offers both educational fun and emotional stability!
70010000120848.intro: Mystical friends met in dreams awaken in vibrant colors at my fingertips!
70010000120848.name: CRAYON MAGIC WORLD

70010000122768.description:
Get ready for a radiant journey in Golem Lights, an engaging puzzle where every beam of light can change everything. Take control of the Mage Golem and use its energy to illuminate the path, awaken other golems, and create luminous connections until you reach the mysterious Crystal Portal.

With 60 levels spread across three enchanting biomes, from the cave’s edge to the crystal core, each challenge invites you to experiment, adjust, and discover new solutions. With no time limits, the experience is relaxed yet strategic, perfect for players who enjoy thinking calmly and testing different possibilities.

Watch as light gradually reveals the environment, activate golems with unique abilities, and manipulate the surroundings to expand your illumination. Each stage is a small puzzle of logic and creativity, where planning and curiosity go hand in hand.

Explore, experiment, and let your light guide the way to victory.
70010000122768.intro: Light the Path, Awaken the Golems
70010000122768.name: Golem Lights

70010000123691.description:
Learning is fun when you have friends around!

Meet the animals, plants, people and other lovely things that you can find around farms, forests, or seas and oceans.

Learn shapes, match colorful pictures with their silhouettes, get to know their names, and make the final picture come to life through interacting with different things!

A suitable adventure for even the youngest of curious explorers!
70010000123691.intro: Play and learn who lives in farmlands, forests and seas!
70010000123691.name: Animal Puzzles

70010000124064.description:
This title is a psychological horror game in which you play as a train conductor on a local line in Japan.

●Story
As usual, the protagonist begins his shift driving a local train deep in the mountains.
However, as he goes about his duties, mysterious and inexplicable events gradually begin to unfold...

●Game Features
- A horror game set in Japan
- Train driver duties experience
- A first-person 3D horror game
- Features five different endings

●Additional elements
A new ending has been added.
70010000124064.intro:
The same scenery, the same routine.
But today, “something” was different…
70010000124064.name: The Vanishing Train

70010000124846.description:
What's hidden behind that mosaic?

"I can kind of see the shape, but... what is it?"
"Oh, I know! ...Wait, maybe not?"
A speed quiz that puts your eyes and instincts to the test.

In this game, you look at a mosaic-covered image and race to pick the correct answer from four choices.

Animals, food, instruments, vehicles, flowers...
With 300 questions covering everything from everyday objects to surprising subjects, there's always something new to guess.

How to play is simple.
・Look at the mosaic image
・Choose your answer from 4 options
・The original image is revealed with the answer!

The thrill of "Wait, THAT's what it was?!" and the satisfaction of "I knew it!" will keep you coming back for more.

Three levels of mosaic intensity await you.
Early stages start with a light mosaic where shapes are visible, building up to an almost impossible heavy mosaic in later stages.
How far can you see through?

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for filling a few spare minutes.

Can you see what's beyond the mosaic?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000124846.intro:
What's hiding behind the mosaic?
The moment you see it is the moment you win.
70010000124846.name: Mosaic Quiz Fastest Finger Battle

70010000124935.description:
Think you can read the room?

Numbers, formulas, symbols, abbreviations...
Each clue hides an English word waiting to be discovered.
"I think I get it... but what is it again?"
"Oh — that's what it means!"
A word puzzle that tests your intuition and English instincts.

In this game, you'll decode visual clues — numbers, scientific formulas, and symbols — then rearrange the scrambled letters to spell out the hidden English word.

How to play:
・Look at the clue and figure out the English word
・Arrange the scrambled letters in the correct order
・Reveal the answer — "So THAT'S what it meant!"

365 → year / H₂O → water / Au 79 → gold...
Math, science, computers, music — 100 questions covering all kinds of knowledge.

A fun word puzzle that doubles as English vocabulary practice. Enjoyable for all ages.
Jump in anytime, one question at a time.

Can you read the room?

Supports both button and touch controls. Play in TV mode, tabletop mode, or handheld mode.
70010000124935.intro:
365, V = IR, A K Q J… What's the word?
Read the clue. Rearrange the letters!
70010000124935.name: Brain Training !Order Quiz

70010000125730.description:
Do you have what it takes to be chosen by the cat lord?

"What does that tail flick really mean?"
"Do different breeds really have different personalities?"
"Who befriended whom first — cats or humans?"
Cats are full of mysteries, even to those who love them most.

This game is a 4-choice image quiz covering everything about cats.
Anatomy and senses, behavior and psychology, breeds, health and care, history and culture, life with humans, curious trivia, and even wild felines.
1000 questions across 8 categories — a complete journey through the feline world.

How to play is simple.
・Look at the image and read the question
・Choose your answer from 4 options
・Read the explanation for a new discovery

Get it right, and you are one step closer to the cat lord's approval.
Get it wrong, and the explanation turns the mistake into knowledge.

Start with just one question at a time.
Perfect for filling a few spare minutes.

Are you ready to take the test of not being abandoned by the cat lord?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000125730.intro:
Are you worthy of being chosen by the cat lord?
1000 questions to prove your love for cats.
70010000125730.name: 1000 Questions to Be Chosen by the Cat Lord

70010000126002.description:
Crystalase is a relaxing puzzle game. Players assemble beautiful images made entirely of sparkling crystals. Each level involves placing crystal pieces in the correct positions to gradually reveal intricate, colourful artwork.
Unlock new images, explore different themes, and enjoy the rewarding process of turning scattered crystals into dazzling masterpieces.
Crystalase is perfect for puzzle lovers and anyone who enjoys creativity, focus and a touch of sparkle.
70010000126002.name: Crystalase

70010000126181.description:
Look closely — something's not quite right.

Living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms, entryways.
Every scene looks like an ordinary day, except one detail is subtly wrong.

Chair legs, clock hands, bookshelf patterns, cup handles...
Oddities so small that most people never notice.
Can you find them?

This is an observation quiz where you just tap the strange spot in a single illustration.
100 questions, all "perfectly normal" scenes.
But when you look a little closer...

How to play is simple.
・Look carefully at the illustration
・Tap the spot that feels off
・If correct, the explanation reveals exactly what was wrong

The unease of "something's off, but what?" and the satisfaction of "there it is!" make this hard to put down.

Hints are available when you get stuck.
A perfect brain workout for your commute, before bed, or a coffee break.

Mysteries hide in everyday life.
Your eyes won't be fooled.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000126181.intro:
Wait — something's off here, isn't it?
Spot the oddity hidden in everyday life.
70010000126181.name: Hidden Oddities in Everyday Life Mystery

70010000126452.description:
Welcome to Fish In — a relaxing yet addictive fishing adventure built for everyone who loves the thrill of a perfect catch.

Explore beautifully crafted worlds, each brimming with unique fish, hidden secrets, and breathtaking scenery. From tranquil forest ponds to mysterious deep-sea trenches, every location offers new species to discover and new challenges to master.

Cast your line and feel the excitement as rare and legendary fish tug at your rod. Build a massive collection of beautifully designed fish — each one hand-crafted with vibrant colors and charming detail. Track your progress, unlock new species, and chase the rarest catches in the game.

Upgrade your fishing gear to reach deeper waters and distant shores. Better rods, stronger lines, and specialized lures open up a world of possibilities. Trade with other anglers, sell your prized catches, and invest in the equipment you need to become the ultimate angler.

With charming character designs, gorgeous environments, and dozens of unique fish to collect, Fish In is a fishing experience unlike any other. Whether you have five minutes or five hours, every session rewards you with something new.

Pick up your rod. The water is calling.
70010000126452.intro: Cast your line across stunning worlds. Catch rare fish, upgrade your gear, and build the ultimate collection. Your fishing adventure awaits!
70010000126452.name: Fish In

70010000127078.description:
Incredible new challenges, amazing graphics and improved mechanics. As a great monarch, you will fight many new and dangerous enemies using your clicker skills. Every click on your screen summons powerful warriors, deals crushing blows to enemies and directs the magic of nature into battle. But be careful — each level will bring even more powerful and treacherous bosses, who will have to be defeated to advance further.

While orcs, goblins and other sinister creatures are getting closer, you will have to improve your castle and develop your army to meet new challenges. For defeating enemies, you will receive coins that can be spent on improving your troops and defensive structures.

Get ready for exciting battles, strategic decisions and unforgettable adventures! The future of the kingdom depends only on your skill and determination. Are you ready to become a real hero and save the world?
70010000127078.intro:
choose your strategy
improve your allies
defeat enemy castle
70010000127078.name: Lord of the Click 4

70010000127204.description:
continue the legendary clicker series, offering unique challenges, deep strategy and exciting gameplay. As a wise king, you once again enter the battle to save the kingdom, which is plunging into darkness.

The game is a 2D autobattler with an isometric view. Place your troops, press "Play" and watch the majestic battles full of surprises. But now everything is in your hands - collect crystals and use powerful spells: call tornadoes or strike enemies with lightning to turn the tide of battle!

Each new level brings more dangerous enemies and insidious bosses. For victories, you will receive stars that can be used to strengthen your army and unlock new combat abilities. Your strategy and instant decisions on the battlefield will be the key to victory.

Get ready for a world where the fate of kingdoms is determined by clicks. Take up the challenge, prove your skills and become a true legend!
70010000127204.intro:
choose your strategy
improve your allies
defeat enemy castle
70010000127204.name: Lord of the Click 5

70010000127661.description:
An ordinary young man is reborn into the world of his favorite comic—only to find himself as a bit-part villain doomed to die. To escape his fate, he must rise as a true villain, gathering allies, defying heroes, and carving a new destiny in this dark fantasy isekai JRPG. Experience a story of survival, betrayal, and ambition where good and evil clash in a pixel-art world.

Fight strategic turn-based battles that blend classic RPG command systems with modern mechanics. Exploit enemy weaknesses, trigger chain attacks, and unleash powerful break attacks. Earn notoriety through misdeeds to rank up and unlock unique arts via a skill tree. Explore dungeons, gather resources, and develop your own evil base with a smithery, lab, smuggling, and more. Packed with pixel-art charm, immersive story, and tactical depth, this parallel world RPG is a must for fans of JRPGs, anime-style games, and fantasy adventures.
70010000127661.intro: Rise as a true villain and carve your own destiny in a dark fantasy RPG!
70010000127661.name: Isekai Villain - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70050000073948.description:
An ordinary young man is reborn into the world of his favorite comic—only to find himself as a bit-part villain doomed to die. To escape his fate, he must rise as a true villain, gathering allies, defying heroes, and carving a new destiny in this dark fantasy isekai JRPG. Experience a story of survival, betrayal, and ambition where good and evil clash in a pixel-art world.

Fight strategic turn-based battles that blend classic RPG command systems with modern mechanics. Exploit enemy weaknesses, trigger chain attacks, and unleash powerful break attacks. Earn notoriety through misdeeds to rank up and unlock unique arts via a skill tree. Explore dungeons, gather resources, and develop your own evil base with a smithery, lab, smuggling, and more. Packed with pixel-art charm, immersive story, and tactical depth, this parallel world RPG is a must for fans of JRPGs, anime-style games, and fantasy adventures.
70050000073948.intro: Rise as a true villain and carve your own destiny in a dark fantasy RPG!
70050000073948.name: Isekai Villain: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000118267.description:
This pack includes the games:

Speedway Racing
Grand Prix Rock ´N Racing
Hypercar Racing

In Speedway Racing, you will enjoy the fastest, most spectacular races at over 350 Km/h, avoiding multiple collisions against 12 rivals.
There are several modes available, including Championship, Arcade and 4-player multiplayer.

Grand Prix Rock 'N Racing gives you the fastest, most exciting races. You can evolve your car, improving the engine, brakes, tires and more until you've achieved the perfect evolution to win the Championship!

In Hypercar Racing you'll enjoy the dirtiest, fastest, and most spectacular races at speeds over 200 Mp/h, avoiding multiple collisions against 8 adversaries. The game has different modes, such as Championship, Arcade, and 4-player multiplayer.

Features:

- Wide variety of tracks.
- Multi-player with 4 players.
- Races with 12 opponents.
- Realistic driving physics.
- Lots of Rock 'N Roll music.
70010000118267.intro: Enjoy 3 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!
70010000118267.name: Asphalt Racing Bundle 3 in 1

70010000118695.description: Dash through a frozen world as a brave seal in this dynamic endless runner! Avoid cracking ice floes, leap over obstacles, and escape predators while collecting fish and unlocking new abilities. Simple gameplay, increasing challenge, and a stunning icy landscape will keep you running for more!
70010000118695.intro: Help the seal overcome the obstacles!
70010000118695.name: Seals from the frosty Bay

70010000120147.description:
Two styles of racing. One complete driving experience.

Enter a world where speed takes different forms — from powerful street machines to high-performance formula cars built for precision and control. Car Racing - Auto & Formula Sport combines two distinct racing styles into one experience, offering both dynamic road racing and professional track competition.

Switch between car racing and formula racing, each with its own driving feel and challenges. Street races focus on control and quick reactions, while formula racing requires precision, timing, and smooth handling. This contrast keeps every race fresh and engaging.

Race across a variety of environments designed to test your driving skills. From open roads to structured circuits, every track pushes your speed, control, and ability to stay focused under pressure.

Choose your vehicle and adapt your driving style to each race. Faster cars demand quick decisions, while formula vehicles require perfect balance and control at high speeds. As you progress, races become more intense and competitive, challenging you to improve with every lap.

Key Features:

- Two Racing Styles: Car racing and formula racing in one game
- Diverse Vehicles: Drive both street cars and high-speed formula cars
- Multiple Tracks: Race across different environments and circuits
- Skill-Based Driving: Focus on control, timing, and precision
- Progressive Challenge: Increasing difficulty and competitive races
- Smooth Controls: Responsive handling for better performance

Master both racing styles and prove you have what it takes to dominate every track.
Drive faster. React quicker. Stay in control.
70010000120147.intro: Power or precision — choose your race
70010000120147.name: Car Racing - Auto & Formula Sport

70010000120715.description:
Steamboat Incident is a 3D survival horror experience set aboard a steamboat lost in the middle of the open sea. You have been kidnapped by the crazy monster. It is said that the monster went crazy after being locked up and away for over 95 years.

Captured and trapped with no clear way out, you wake up and must explore the ship’s tight corridors and rusting decks in search of clues, tools, and a way to escape.

But you are not alone. The monster is still there, reacting to sound and movement. Every step, every creak of the floorboards could give you away.

Hide, stay quiet, and think carefully as you solve puzzles and fix the steamboat in order to escape.

Features:
* A terrifying journey across the open ocean, stranded on a decaying steamboat while something hunts you from the depths. 
* Explore tight passageways and claustrophobic corridors as you uncover the steamboat dark secrets. 
* Search the steamboat for parts needed to fix the wheel and escape.
* Scavenge for clues, supplies, and hiding spots to stay one step ahead of the creature trying to hunt you down. 
* Find items like canned food to recover, and broken wheel parts to bring the steamboat back to life. 
* Evade a horrifying barnacle-covered entity stalking the ship - run, hide, and survive. Take cover under tables or inside rooms to avoid detection. 
* Use tools like crowbars to break into locked areas and reveal hidden paths and deeper mysteries.
70010000120715.intro: Trapped at sea on a steamboat - fix it, hide, and escape
70010000120715.name: Steamboat Incident

70010000120918.description:
Enter the world of The Fallen Kingdom, a fast-paced action RPG adventure. Fight your way through intense bullet hell-inspired battles where quick reflexes, strategic movement, and powerful abilities are the key to survival. Explore dangerous environments filled with enemies, hidden surprises, and challenging boss fights that will test your combat skills at every step.

Unlock and upgrade abilities through a deep and rewarding skill tree, allowing you to customize your playstyle and become stronger with every battle. Experience a simple yet engaging story that keeps the adventure moving forward while introducing new challenges and unexpected moments along the way.

Key Features
	•	Battle powerful bosses with challenging and dynamic attack patterns
	•	Unlock new abilities and strengthen your character through a detailed skill tree
	•	Explore atmospheric levels filled with enemies, secrets, and surprises
	•	Discover a simple but engaging story that drives the adventure forward
	•	Face increasingly difficult encounters that reward skill and strategy
	•	Fight through intense levels packed with action, danger, and progression


Every battle brings new challenges, every victory makes you stronger, and every moment pushes you closer to becoming a true legend of The Fallen Kingdom.
70010000120918.intro: Step into the fallen kingdom and fight for victory.
70010000120918.name: The Fallen Kingdom

70010000126011.description:
When a distress signal from deep with the earth is received, it's the D.U.M.B. ducks to rescue! They must retrieve their fellow ducks, as well as lost equipment, then blow up the underground caverns in the process. There's only one thing to worry about -- giant, carnivorous snails! Will the ducks or snails survive to eat the other side?

Carry up to four guns at once as you fight for your fellow fowl's lives!
70010000126011.intro: The D.U.M.B. ducks are back for an Emergency Rescue!
70010000126011.name: D.U.M.B.E.R. Ducks

70050000074272.description: A set of new pictograms for creating stories!
70050000074272.name: Fantasy Pack

70070000036374.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of bowling with Bowling Fever!

Test your skills in countless game modes, visit amazingly realistic 3D locations, play fantastic mini-games and discover dozens of new bowling balls and pins!

Need a hand? Various power-ups and boosts will help you to meet the challenges.

A bowling game has never been this exciting!

- Fantastic bowling alleys from around the world.
- Fantastic 20+ balls, pins and lanes to show off!
- Multiple mini-games to complete.
- Multiple game modes to play!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #3, expansion pack #4 and expansion pack #5 with:

-30 new bowling ball styles
70070000036374.intro: Fire up "Bowling Fever" and be carried away by the emotions!
70070000036374.name: Bowling Fever Master Edition

70070000036375.description:
Football Legends 2025 brings the thrill of the world’s most popular sport to your Nintendo Switch™!

Step onto the pitch and experience pure football excitement across multiple game modes and stadiums.

Play a Quick Match for instant action — perfect for a fast-paced challenge alone or with friends in local multiplayer.

Want more control? Choose the Single Match mode to select your favorite team, stadium, weather, and time of day — and compete head-to-head with friends or AI opponents.

Take on the ultimate challenge in Tournament Mode, where 16 elite teams battle for glory. Only the best can lift the trophy!

Multiple stadiums, each offering customizable weather conditions — from sunny afternoons to rainy nights under the floodlights.

Get ready to kick off, score spectacular goals, and become a true Football Legend!

This bundle includes base game, Team Pack #1, Team Pack #2 and Team Pack #3 with:
- 9 new teams
70070000036375.intro: Play. Score. Win. Become a Football Legend!
70070000036375.name: Football Legends 2025 Complete Edition

70070000036379.description:
Push Beyond Limits – Rule the Race!

Get ready for the next generation of speed in Formula Racing Pro 2026! Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush as you take on faster cars, smarter rivals, and brand-new circuits inspired by the world’s most iconic tracks.

With enhanced graphics, improved physics, and dynamic weather, every lap feels more real than ever. Master your racing line, react to changing track conditions, and fight for the top spot in intense head-to-head battles.

Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out, Formula Racing Pro 2026 delivers pure racing excitement — accessible, fast, and endlessly thrilling!

Tune your car, chase the podium, and prove you’re the fastest driver on the grid. The future of racing starts now!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1, expansion pack #3 and expansion pack #4 with:

9 stunning new liveries for your race cars, adding style and personality to your high-speed adventures.
70070000036379.intro: Push Beyond Limits – The Future of Racing Starts Now!
70070000036379.name: Formula Racing Pro 2026 Elite Edition

70070000036381.description:
Get behind the wheel in Motorbikes Pro 2025 and experience the excitement of high-speed racing! With stunning graphics and intuitive controls, this game is perfect for racers of all ages. 

This thrilling racing game puts you right in the driver’s seat of fast-paced Motorbikes racing action. Feel the rush as you speed through corners, overtake opponents, and navigate each twist and turn of the track with precision. Accessible, fun, and incredibly addictive!

Choose your car, perfect your timing, and race your way to glory. The track is calling, and the thrill of victory is just one race away!

This bundle includes base game and expansion pack #3 with:

- set of premium skins for motorbikes
70070000036381.intro: Feel the Speed, Own the Track!
70070000036381.name: Motorbikes Pro 2025 Prime Edition

70070000036438.description:
Discover the perfect balance of strategy and skill in Snooker Fever.  This game brings the classic snooker experience to the Nintendo Switch™, whether you're a seasoned snooker player or just picking up a cue for the first time.

With 10 beautifully crafted tables, customizable cues, and CPU opponents that keep you on your toes, every game feels fresh. Take on the challenge solo or invite a friend for some local competition. Focus on sinking that perfect shot, while the stunning 3D visuals capture the atmosphere of a real snooker hall.

Snooker Fever has all the tools you need to master the game, enjoy some friendly competition, and just have a great time.

Key Features:

10 different tables 
15 custom cues 
3 levels of opponents
Local multiplayer 
Smooth controls and realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #1, Expansion Pack #3 and Expansion Pack #4 with:

- 15 stunning new table designs
- 5 sleek cue styles
70070000036438.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000036438.name: Snooker Fever Elite Edition

70070000036441.description:
Cook tons of delicious meals from all over the world and become the best chef in the city!

Cook hundreds of tasty dishes with all the possible kitchen appliances and countless ingredients! 
Try it all: coffee makers, juice machines, pizza ovens, frying pans, fryers and ice cream machines. 

Upgrade and decorate your restaurants to attract more clients. 

Upgrade your kitchen appliances and ingredients to cook tasty dishes faster and earn more money!

This comprehensive collection includes three great cooking games: Food Truck Tycoon, Burger Chef Tycoon and Pizza Bar Tycoon!

Features:
* More than 100 dishes to serve 
* 3 unique locations
* More than 200 levels to explore
* Countless upgrades
* Unlock new items to upgrade your kitchen appliances, interiors and ingredients
* 100+ achievements to gain

This bundle includes Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle, Pizza Bar Tycoon New Levels #1, Pizza Bar Tycoon Multiplayer Mode and Food Truck Tycoon New Levels #1 with:

- 20 new levels for Pizza Bar Tycoon
- 45 new levels for Food Truck Tycoon
- local multiplayer gameplay mode for Pizza Bar Tycoon

NOTE: to play the Multiplayer Mode DLC, each player will need their own set of Joy-Con™ or an additional Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller.
70070000036441.intro: A series of great cooking games in one brand-new collection!
70070000036441.name: Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle Elite Edition

70070000036448.description:
Racers, beware! 

Fast-paced, polished and dynamic motorbike racing now on Nintendo Switch™!

One of a kind game entirely playable with... Toy-Con™ Motorbike!

Forget about speed limits and traffic rules 'cause on this road you're the boss!

A unique mix of endless and arcade racing game featuring countless hours of fun!

IN MOTO RUSH GT YOU WILL FIND:

• Over 100 levels to beat!
• Endless racing experience
• 12 customizable motorbikes
• Toy-Con™ Motorbike support
• Race against time, ghost opponents or try various challenges! 
• Motion Controls – play by rotating your console!
• Play with the Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller
• Support all play styles - TV Mode, Tabletop Mode, Handheld Mode, Toy-Con™ Motorbike
• Experience 4 different game modes 
• Weather and day-cycle effects: rain, night, storm! 
• Experience beautifully designed roads around the world

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack, Grip Collection #3 and Grip Collection #4 with:

- 4 new motorbikes (each with special colors)
- New colors for the rest of motorbikes
- New colors for gloves
- Special, Golden colors for motorbikes
- 8 pairs of state-of-the-art racing gloves, crafted for the ultimate grip and control.
70070000036448.intro: Ultimate motorbike racing experience for all ages!
70070000036448.name: Moto Rush GT Add-on Edition

70070000036488.description:
In S.N.I.P.E.R.: Hunter Scope you will shoot, you will fight, and you will win!

Play S.N.I.P.E.R., the latest sniping game where you aim, fight and destroy virtual enemies. Try different types of missions, inspired both by classic rail shooters and modern cover shooters. Fight your way out during day and night, destroy evil forces and unlock new weapons and power-ups.

Game includes:
15+ STAGES
30+ WEAPONS
30+ GALLERY ITEMS
60+ SPECIAL ACHIEVEMENTS 

Become a hunter, mount your scope, and fight for our freedom!

This bundle includes base game, Weaponry Upgrade, Elite Arsenal and Expansion Pack #2 with:

-PIS-30-ARM pistol: a reliable sidearm 
-FMS-1-LEO rifle: a versatile and adaptable rifle for any situation 
-SN-1000-FUT sniper rifle: a state-of-the-art weapon with cutting-edge features for ultimate accuracy 
-RVL-357-WES pistol: a classic revolver with a timeless design 
-BK-47-CAM rifle: a rugged and reliable rifle inspired by the old west 
-SN-1100-TRI sniper rifle: a modern-day cowboy sniper rifle 
- FMS-1-G rifle

Conquer your enemies in the wild west style!
70070000036488.name: S.N.I.P.E.R. - Hunter Scope Enhancement Edition

70070000036504.description:
This pack includes the games:

-Grand Prix Rock ´N Racing
-9-Ball Pocket
-Ping Pong Up
-World Soccer Pinball
70070000036504.intro: Enjoy 4 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!
70070000036504.name: 4 in 1 Sports Bundle Vol 2

70070000037016.description:
A large set of your child's favorite memory game, this time in a vacation edition. 

Find the pairs, have fun, and practice
70070000037016.intro: Take your favorite game on vacation!
70070000037016.name: Spy Guy Memory Vacation Edition

70010000121218.description:
Take control of a combat helicopter and enter missions where every second matters. Support ground forces, eliminate threats, and complete objectives in fast-paced aerial operations.
Engage in intense missions across dynamic environments where threats come from every direction. Each situation pushes you to react quickly, manage resources, and adapt your strategy in real time.
Stay in constant motion while navigating compact, action-focused maps filled with enemies, hazards, and objectives. From urban conflict zones to military bases, every location tests your control and decision-making.
Use a mix of weapons and systems to handle different combat scenarios. Suppress enemies with your machine gun, launch rockets against heavy targets, and manage fuel and ammo carefully to stay operational.
A unique hook system lets you capture and transport objects, evacuate civilians, and complete mission objectives under pressure. Carrying cargo affects your maneuverability and increases risk, adding a strategic layer to every flight.

Key Features:
	•	Aerial Combat Gameplay: Fast-paced helicopter action
	•	 Mission Variety: Different types of objectives
	•	Weapon Systems: Core combat equipment
	•	Resource Management: Fuel and ammo matter
	•	 Hook Mechanic: Transport and rescue system
	•	Dynamic Maps: Designed for constant action
	•	Progressive Difficulty: Increasing challenge over time

Control the airspace, respond under pressure, and complete every mission with precision.
70010000121218.name: Helicopter Shooter - Hot Ace Heli War Borne

70010000126784.description: Embark on an adventure across Kitten Island, exploring 15 stages in this sequel to the acclaimed Kitten Island. Collect every item and face off against evil creatures. Can you find the secret boss?
70010000126784.intro: Enter the ultimate journey across Kitten Island, featuring 3 unique biomes and a hidden secret. Can you do it?
70010000126784.name: Kitten Island 2

70010000100646.description:
- D&D-inspired visual novel with 8 unique characters. 
- Immersive reading experience of at least 6 hours on your first play-through. 
- Branching narrative with 3 unique endings.
- Casual drink mixing and quest building with a dash of challenge – a refinement of the original game’s mechanics.
- LGBTQ+ positive representation. 
- Content warning: mentions of death, grief, and violence.
- A new standalone game in the Tavern Talk universe!

Once Upon A Time...
...you find yourself in a little, bleary portside town in the south-east of Phesoa. There, 36 years before the events of Tavern Talk, you dive into the role of the Tavernkeep, the owner of The Drowsy Dragon, a small quayside bar on the coast of Borkam. 

You have a special ability, gifted by one of the Great Dragon Gods or acquired through wizardly hubris: Mixing magic drinks that can alter the fate of your guests—be it mean mercenaries, savvy sailors or ambitious adventurers. Every guest, no matter who they are, has a place in your warm tavern by the seaside. 

In The Drowsy Dragon, fate is not written in the stars, it is written in the menu! Mix unique drinks from a wide ensemble of magical potions—but be aware: There is more than one solution! 

As you listen to stories brimming with the spirit of adventure, you sit within the cozy walls of your tavern and pick up rumors to turn them into quests. Some of them are old sailor’s yarn, so sort them thoroughly before sticking them up the wall! 

As you meet new and familiar faces, all seems well. Your establishment is flourishing and friendships are made. All until something starts brewing on the horizon, something that’s going to twist your brightest dreams into your darkest nightmares. 

Content Warning
Like in every good Pen & Paper campaign, Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker touches topics that may hit right in the feels. Please be aware that there will be mentions of death, grief and violence.
70010000100646.intro: In this D&D-inspired visual novel you will run a cozy seaside tavern, meet adventurers, gather rumours and mix fate-altering drinks to stop dreams from twisting into nightmares.
70010000100646.name: Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker

70010000110059.description:
Poetic Trio is a themed set of three games. A game about rain (Pluviophile), a game about snow (Chionophile), and a game about wind (Loverowind). All in one. The core aspect of each game is the atmosphere. It is recommended for those who mostly seek to experience the mood.


Pluviophile is a short experience about the mood of rain in the woods. It is a slow-paced pure walking simulator; you only walk, slowly, in the wilderness away from civilization. A beautiful poem from Julius Cawein accompanies your short journey; and the original music score that is composed by Pınar Karabaş.

*

Chionophile is a short experience about the mood of winter in the woods. It is a slow-paced pure walking simulator; you only walk, slowly, in the wilderness away from civilization. A beautiful poem from Archibald Lampman accompanies your short journey; and the original music score that is composed by Pınar Karabaş.

The game has 2 chapters. While the first one is a little linear, the second one (which is more expansive) takes place in a large open area. There are paths for the player to follow to reduce confusion about where to go. But you are free to roam away from the path and discover.

*

Loverowind is a short experience about the wind of spring. Similar to Pluviophile, you collect flowers, and use them on the altars to reveal a poem. But this time you move much faster, unless the circles of light roaming in the world don't catch you.
70010000110059.intro: A game about rain, a game about snow, and a game about wind. All in one.
70010000110059.name: Poetic Trio

70010000116473.description:
Find the hidden kitties around the apartment! Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments is an isometric hidden object game themed around cats and colorful little rooms. Explore unique, adorably decorated cube-shaped bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, bathrooms and more as you search for dozens of cleverly obscured felines lying around each stage.

By finding all the cats in an apartment, you’ll clear the stage and unlock the next. Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments is calm, casual and therapeutic with a soothing soundtrack to match, making it the perfect “anytime” experience!

• Find the cats hidden in colorful isometric apartments!
• Unlock new rooms of gradually increasing complexity.
• Rotate the apartment rooms to change your viewpoint and avoid obstructions!
• Click on cleverly placed felines to reduce the cat counter to zero.
70010000116473.intro: Solve feline-themed hidden object challenges in cute cube-shaped isometric apartments!
70010000116473.name: Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments

70010000122315.description:
Story:
1981, Somewhere in Europe.

Eighteen-year-old Noah is haunted by the memory of his mother abandoning him as a child.
He lives with his father Leonard, a failed writer obsessed with collecting items related to “Dictator X.” 
Noah wishes he would stop, but Leonard refuses to give up his strange obsession, even as they struggle financially.

One day, an auction invitation arrives, addressed to Leonard. Ignoring Noah’s protests, Leonard sets off for the old castle where the auction is to be held, promising to tell Noah everything once he returns.
But Leonard never comes home. With no way to contact him, Noah heads to the castle himself, determined to bring him home—only to witness something shocking.
Trapped inside the castle with the other guests, Noah decided to accept the Auctioneer's invitation, and take part in the auction himself.


Characters:
Noah Crawford (VA. Kengo Kawanishi)
Leonard Crawford (VA. Rikiya Koyama)
Edgar Schultz (VA. Daisuke Namikawa)
Christoph Treheim von Berg (VA. Nobunaga Shimazaki)
Otto Klein (VA. Shunsuke Takeuchi)
Karla Becker (VA. Maaya Uchida)
Lorraine Klopp (VA. Yui Ishikawa)
Hell (VA. Akira Ishida)
Auctioneer (VA. Show Hayami)

Game features:
- Explore freely within an old castle rendered in 3D
- Use reasoning and deduction to solve clues via the Word Cloud System
- Use memories to expose the truth via each Auction

In the exploration phase, you will search rooms and floors, and talk to other participants, revealing trauma and lies that will lead you to the truth each one keeps hidden.

Information you learn here will be stored in your Word Cloud, and can then be used to solve mysteries during each auction!

But in this place, the auction exhibits aren't bid on with money, but with memories.
Auction participants try to win their bids by offering their own memories, using a memory reconstruction device known as EPO.
But memories burdened by secrets or trauma can change completely, becoming distorted and incorrect.
If the participants offer incomplete memories, their auction bids will fail.

Noah must become their supporter, fixing each target's memory to ensure they are correct.
If the auction is a success, the truth will be revealed—unleashing the dramatic story behind each ill-fated auction exhibit.

Story / Script: Rika Suzuki 
Character Design: KOHSKE
Music: Yuko Komiyama, Tsukasa Masuko
Director / Producer: Shinsuke Umeda 

* This game is a story about young people learning about the past, and striving to protect a peaceful future. Although memories related to past wars feature in this game, it does not in any way, seek to glorify or promote the crimes of war.
70010000122315.intro:
The Auction of Dark Memories Begins Now.
What truths await beyond a bid made with your life?
70010000122315.name: Dark Auction - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70050000072679.description: This is an upgrade pack that allows you to upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ software “Dark Auction” to “Dark Auction Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.”
70050000072679.intro:
The Auction of Dark Memories Begins Now.
What truths await beyond a bid made with your life?
70050000072679.name: Dark Auction - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition upgrade pack

70010000096065.description:
Pre-order now and unlock two unique in-game dice skins inspired by iconic Star Wars characters: Jawa and Clone Trooper.

Assemble your team, build your roster of iconic Star Wars™ characters, and battle with your friends and family for control of the galaxy as you move across storied planets and locations.
Choose from a wide array of Star Wars heroes and villains, each with their own unique abilities. Whether you're teaming up with Luke Skywalker or unleashing Darth Vader, every match is packed with team strategy, surprises, and classic Star Wars moments. No two battles unfold the same way, the fate of your team is yours to shape!

STAR WARS MEETS MONOPOLY®
Step into the Star Wars galaxy with a bold new twist on MONOPOLY. Experience iconic cinematic moments while competing with family and friends across iconic locations from every era of the saga.

PLAY AS A TEAM, WIN AS A TEAM
Team up with your friends and family through online play or couch co-op and experience MONOPOLY like never before with 2v2 and 3v3 competitive game modes. With endless team compositions, the game transforms classic competition into a fun strategic showdown.

ASSEMBLE YOUR ICONIC STAR WARS TEAM
Each character brings distinct hero abilities, allowing you to shape your team’s composition and lead your team to victory. Command legends like Darth Maul and Princess Leia, each with game-changing skills that turn the tide in your favor.

COMMAND THE DICE, CONTROL THE BOARD
The game can change with every roll as properties change hands in an instant. Dynamic GO events unleash game-altering twists and shift momentum rapidly, making each turn critical and victory uncertain until the final turn.

A NEW ADVENTURE EVERY MATCH
With action-packed matches, evolving team strategies, and tons of unlockable cosmetics, no two games are exactly the same. Experiment with different heroes to assemble the perfect team. There's always a reason to jump back in for one more round.
70010000096065.name: Monopoly: Star Wars™ Heroes vs. Villains

70010000097761.description:
Under the fluttering cherry blossoms on the streets of Japan, your cross-cultural romance adventure begins now! The game authentically recreates famous Japanese landmarks, where four distinctively charming Japanese girls await to meet you. Amid sweet dates, a life-or-death chase suddenly erupts on Tokyo’s late-night streets, and you accidentally stumble upon the underworld’s dark dealings of power and lust – beneath the romantic surface, a surging undercurrent of life-and-death choices lies hidden. Scenes you never dared to imagine come at you one after another! Tear through the crisis with courage, lock onto true feelings with perfect chemistry.

Deadly Charm・Japanese Heroine Gallery
An energetic anime-style cosplayer, a cool goddess who practices kendo and rides a motorcycle, a millionaire female CEO, a Japanese idol with no control over her own fate… Loli girls, graceful onee-sama, pure first loves — sweet, spicy, or dark, fierce, dashing, or gentle! All the most iconic personality types from Japanese anime and dramas are gathered here. Each is a full-fledged Japanese heroine with powerful presence. At least one of them will make your heart race uncontrollably.

Desperate Run・Tokyo Survival Files
A Tokyo adventure! In a second, you’re pulled into a real J-drama world. The story twists and turns, making your emotions surge out of control. Unpredictable plot developments, challenges full of surprise and fun — skill battles, chases, kidnappings, one wrong step and you lose your life. Go head-to-head with classic J-drama villains. All the excitement from a first-person perspective. Did you really think you were just here for a date?

Real-shot Impact・Immersive Japan Pilgrimage
Over 20 real-life shots of popular Japanese photo spots — real sunlight, real nightscapes come right at you. Akihabara, Kamakura, Tokyo Tower, Yokohama Cosmoclock… famous locations from numerous anime and manga, plus spectacular Japanese festivals and cultural scenes you’ve never seen before! Without leaving home, you can feel the streets of Japan across the ocean, immerse yourself, experience firsthand just how wonderful Japanese life can be, and witness the mind-blowing collision that breaks through the dimensional wall.
70010000097761.intro:
Cherry blossoms fall, hearts race wild.
Fall in love – or fight for your life.
Real Japan, real danger, real romance.
70010000097761.name: Blossom Voyage

70010000100251.description:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track brings chaotic local and online multiplayer track-building action to the next level – band together with friends to collaborate and build your track across new procedurally generated worlds - WHILST the train is running! So think fast, with more freedom than ever before, and conquer new obstacles in your way - before your trains becomes… a trainwreck! 

CHOOSE YOUR TRACK 
Now featuring a story spread across new environments, on branching paths for you to choose, so no two runs will feel the same. In these biomes you’ll now be able encounter new points of interests, side quests, daunting bosses and as well as other random encounters, so adapt quickly on your feet! New unlockable cosmetics also let you add your personal touch to your characters’ story. 

YOUR JOURNEY GETS BETTER AND BETTER 
Every excursion your crew undertakes feels increasingly meaningful, with new rewards and permanent upgrades granting you character with gameplay-modifying abilities, as well as new train engines, wagons and extensions to unlock, giving you the tools to build a multitude of train configurations to play and experiment with. Each locomotive loss is an opportunity to rebuild and get… back on track! 

CREATE, SHARE AND PLAY WITH THE COMMUNITY 
The all-new Terrain Conductor mode allows you unleash your imagination to create your very own custom maps and share these with the Unrailed community – with highlights being featured by the developers. Or if creating isn’t your thing, browse the limitless creations other players have built, so the frantic fun never ends! 

CO-OPERATE TO COMPETE 
Fulfill your burning competitive urge – manically duke it out in against another team in the new 8-player Vs Mode. Test your team’s prowess in online leaderboards with action replays and see who can achieve the highest scores.
70010000100251.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000100251.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track

70010000105159.description:
KILL ALL ENEMIES

Arashi Gaiden is a turn-based action game with fast-paced dash and slash combat. Use the dash mechanic to quickly traverse levels and slice your enemies in half in style, combining your blade with shurikens, teleports and chains that paralyze your opponents.

BREAK THE TURN STRUCTURE

Overcome levels with mechanics that change how you play and face Bosses that redefine what a turn-based game is by using special abilities in real time.

Stop the time of your enemies, play shurikens, teleport and change the direction of your dash!
Use special skills to master the field of combat, make combos and win creatively.

Survive 7 bosses that also break the turn structure, using bombs, traps, flying cuts, flames and more! Play carefully or frantically, the choice is yours.

- Over 5 hours of fun in turn-based combat, with diverse challenges and multiple solutions.
- A new level for an innovative combat system, Dash and Slash: enjoy turn-based combat with fast moves.
- Experience a stylish turn-based action game with puzzle features (or vice versa).

WIN WITH STYLE

- Get Power-Ups as you progress through the game, but manage them well during the match.
- Achieve the perfect score in each room.
- Replay each Stage with new powers after unlocking it.
- Enjoy guts and blood flying everywhere in pixel art while cutting your enemies in beautiful stages featuring settings from different locations in Japan.
- Discover Arashi's story, his involvement with Lobo and deepen the Lore of the Bravery Universe.
70010000105159.intro: Arashi Gaiden is a turn-based action game with fast dash-and-slash combat. Use blades, shurikens, teleports, and chains to defeat enemies and powerful bosses with unique mechanics.
70010000105159.name: Arashi Gaiden

70010000105359.description:
Take the role of an unhinged lady chemist in raucous side-scrolling platformer Love Chemistry - Sibella’s Formula! Shoot syringes of your special mind-control formula at weird enemies, from robots and carnivorous plants to roving bookworms, and make your way through tricky corridors in old-school pixel art style!

Avoid thorny spike traps, climb ladders to reach higher platforms, dodge projectiles and manipulate foes into falling for your flirty charms. Find and collect health items to keep this wild adventure on track as you battle through laboratories, cityscapes and more, zipping between stages on your high-tech hover bike!

• Run, jump and climb through laboratories and city streets.
• Battle roving robots, bookworms, monsters and more.
• Shoot syringes of your “love potion” to manipulate enemies.
• Avoid treacherous traps and collect useful items to survive.
• Enjoy retro pixel art with colorful HD presentation.
70010000105359.intro: Make your enemies fall for you in a side-scrolling platforming adventure about weird science!
70010000105359.name: Love Chemistry - Sibella's Formula

70010000109497.description:
Mori Carta is a handless deckbuilding roguelike. Choose left or right on every card to adventure through stories. Simple decisions lead to rich and rewarding gameplay. Four dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets, more than 1000 playable cards, over 185 unique enemies.

Features:
Deceptively simple controls: Almost every interaction in the game is handled by moving left or right.

Engaging story: Adventure with a colorful cast of characters that accompany you on your adventures.

Rich depth of builds and combos: Choosing cards to add to your deck will be critical in surviving your adventures. With over 1000 cards, the combinations are endless.

4 dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets.
1000+ playable cards.
185 unique enemies.
70010000109497.intro: Decide fast. Build smart. Survive longer.
70010000109497.name: Mori Carta

70010000112444.description:
Help Xi navigate a five-day time loop and figure out what happened to her memories in a vast hand-drawn world.
 
Together with her companion, Ouro, travel through a true metroidvania world where time changes the terrain in subtle ways. Escape the loop through exploration and battle. Change Xi’s fate and learn the truth of the Dragon Loop!
 
• Turn Bosses into Summonable Spirits
 
Defeat a wide range of interesting bosses to get exclusive summonable spirits. Destroy your foes with powerful Explosive Spirits, or summon Persistent Spirit companions to follow you around. Upgrade and evolve both types to enhance their combat power!
 
• Multipurpose Metroidvania Powers
 
Find rare Pearls to summon powerful tools that help you traverse the world. Spiky pufferfish, magnetic boxes, a vacuuming whale spirit… and more. Each has multiple uses in both combat and traversing the world, unlocking many ways to play!
 
• Fast-Paced Exciting Battles
 
Combine Xi’s strength with Ouro’s agility in fast-paced combat. Play well, manage your X-Rating, and boost your speed and combat power even further in this fast-paced combat system with no contact damage.
 
• Branches in Time
 
In Dragon Loop, time is a limited resource. Use your five days wisely and plan your routes through an easily-navigable Time Map. Explore and open up new worldlines to see how things play out differently.But don’t worry: this isn’t a roguelike; you never start from scratch.
70010000112444.intro: Escape The Time Loop In This Open-World Metroidvania
70010000112444.name: Dragon Loop

70010000119805.description:
"You close the door of your refrigerator and an interesting life begins inside. Fruits and vegetables try to escape from this big white cage. Break everything around you and smash through shelves to find a way out. The more precise the timing of the jump, the more powerful the impact. That's exactly what you need to succeed! 

Try to get out all the fruits and vegetables out of the fridge. Carrot, cucumber, sausage, and even a spoon for some reason.

Check out the new fun game from the NOSTRA.GAMES team. 

Let the Big Fridge Riot begin! "
70010000119805.intro: Bouncing fruits and vegetables in your fridge - what could be more unusual?
70010000119805.name: Flippy Jump

70010000120830.description:
Design the space of your dreams in a world filled with cozy emotions. In <Lovely Deco House>, gather materials from nature, such as plants and rocks, to create unique furniture and props, offering creative joy. Just like dyeing old cloth with cherry blossoms to make pretty pink fabric, your ideas will soon become wonderful interiors.

Decorate the homes of your cute doll friends with carefully crafted furniture. From charming rabbit cafes to emotionally rich chick camping sites, new stories bloom wherever your touch reaches. But simple decoration isn't everything. Explore regions with their own mysterious characteristics and bravely overcome the obstacles you encounter. The rare materials you discover after hard work will make your space even more special. Start your heartwarming deco journey right now!
70010000120830.intro: Create your own healing space through collecting and crafting, a deco adventure with cute friends!
70010000120830.name: Lovely Deco House

70010000122434.description:
Heaven has turned against her. 

Waves of divine soldiers, mythological beasts, and rogue gods close in from every direction and they never stop coming. 

You are Aphrodite, the most powerful and most hunted goddess in the Greek world, walking alone through ancient lands as the sky itself attacks you.

Pick up weapons. Evolve them. Destroy everything.

Every run is different. Weapons combine and transform into devastating divine tools. Arrows of desire become storms of golden light. 

Shields of beauty become walls of destruction. The longer you survive, the stronger you become, until the screen fills with hundreds of enemies and your arsenal fills with chaos.

This is not a game you play once. This is a game you cannot stop playing.


Features:

● AUTO-ATTACK SURVIVAL GAMEPLAY: Focus on moving and positioning. Your weapons fire automatically. Your job is to survive long enough to become unstoppable.

● EVOLVE YOUR WEAPONS: Combine weapons and items to trigger powerful evolutions. Find the right synergies and watch your build go from mortal to divine.

● ENDLESS WAVES OF DIVINE ENEMIES: Gods, titans, mythological creatures, and heavenly armies. They keep coming. You keep fighting.

● GREEK MYTHOLOGY SETTING: Ancient landscapes, golden temples, divine ruins. Battle across the world of the gods as the one they could never defeat.


One more run. Just one more. That is what they all say.
Aphrodite does not die here.
70010000122434.intro:
Thousands of gods want her dead. She just wants to evolve her weapons.
Play as Aphrodite and survive the divine wrath of Olympus!
70010000122434.name: Aphrodite Evolve Weapons Survivor: Greek Gods Versus Heaven

70010000122651.description:
Let's go fishing on the Nintendo Switch™!
Travel to different world locations like North America, Europe, Africa, and the Amazon!
Each spot is home to lots of unique fish to discover!
Play solo, or compete with up to 4 players using one Joy-Con™ each!
Become the world's greatest angler!

[Score Attack]
Catch as many fish as you can within the time limit!
Look out for big fish to boost your score!

[Endless]
Sit back, relax, and enjoy endless fishing!
Watch the scenery shift from day to night!
Change your gear when the situation calls and search for big catches!

[Ranking]
Compete against players around the world in Score Attack and Endless modes!
Show off your skills by increasing your high score and rank!

[Battle]
Compete with up to 4 players for the highest score!
Face off against CPUs in single-player mode!

[Shop]
Spend the points you've earned from fishing to buy new lures and rods!
Discover the perfect combination for your fishing style!

[Records]
Every fish you catch will be added to your personal encyclopedia!
70010000122651.intro:
Embark on a fishing adventure around the world!
Cast your line and reel in fish from across the globe!
70010000122651.name: Reel it! World Fishing

70010000122762.description:
Dive into an irresistible chase in Honey Sprint, where a hungry bear must escape a furious swarm while collecting as much honey as possible along the way. With simple controls and nonstop action, each run blends quick reflexes, smart decisions, and pure fun.

Dodge obstacles, slide under branches, and jump at the right moment to keep your flow while chasing ever-higher scores. The tracks change with every attempt, always bringing fresh challenges and that addictive “just one more run” feeling.

Colorful, dynamic, and full of personality, Honey Sprint is perfect for quick sessions and lighthearted moments, delivering an engaging experience that balances challenge and pure entertainment.
70010000122762.intro: Run, Jump, and Devour All the Honey
70010000122762.name: Honey Sprint

70010000123200.description:
Welcome aboard the Determination Bringer!
 
You have been appointed senior conductor of the legendary train, which all the citizens of our vast country are happy to see in their cities. Your responsibilities are maintaining order in the carriage assigned to you and providing assistance to passengers along the way. Your tools are reporting, intimidation, searches and ejection. Remember: the conductor is always right.

Monitor the passengers
Carefully monitor everyone who enters the carriage and decide what to do with fare-evaders. Observe and report all suspicious, unauthorized and basically any passenger activity. Search the baggage and call the police if you find prohibited items.

Move up the train
Get access to the dining car or VIP compartments and carriages where high-ranking officials and big industrialists ride. Keep an eye on your colleagues and report their accepting bribes or transporting banned goods. The Ministry will not let your dedication go unnoticed.

Complete secret missions
Earn the trust of higher-ups in order to receive special assignments. Their level of secrecy will depend on your loyalty, and completion will be rewarded with a bonus or even a promotion. You will also encounter smugglers — transporting their packages along the route is risky, but profitable.
 
Visit various stations and remote corners of the country. Make difficult decisions determining the fate of passengers and your colleagues. What kind of person will you be at the end of the journey? The choice is yours!
70010000123200.name: Beholder: Conductor

70010000123840.description:
She has thousands of followers, a ring light, and a smile that breaks the internet.

Getting her attention is already hard. 
Getting a date? Even harder. 
Making her fall for you? That's the real challenge.

Each one with her own channel, her own vibe, her own reason to be impossible to forget. Work your way up, get on their radar, and earn your way into their world.

Because behind the camera, they're just girls who want someone real.

The question is whether that someone is you.


Features:

● DATE YOUTUBERS: Each girl is a star in her own right. Beauty, gaming, lifestyle, drama. Get close enough and find out who she really is when the camera's off.

● MAKE HER NOTICE YOU: She has thousands of fans. You have one shot. Go on dates around the city, say the right things, and become the one she actually thinks about.

● KEEP THE CHAT ALIVE: Text her between dates. Don't go cold. Girls who get a lot of attention drop fast the guys who don't keep up.

● UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE IMAGES: The closer she lets you in, the more she shares. Things her followers will never see.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Not every story ends the same. How far you get depends entirely on you.

A girl with millions of eyes on her. 
Completely out of reach. 
Or is she?

Prove you're worth her time.
70010000123840.intro:
Millions watch her. 
Do you think you can make her look at you?
70010000123840.name: Youtuber Girls: Love Behind the Camera

70010000123846.description:
He has thousands of followers, a perfect setup, and a presence that stops the scroll.

Getting his attention is already hard.
Getting a date? Even harder.
Making him fall for you? That's the real challenge.

Each one with his own channel, his own vibe, his own reason to be impossible to forget. Work your way up, get on their radar, and earn your way into their world.

Because behind the camera, they're just guys who want someone real.

The question is whether that someone is you.

Features:

● DATE YOUTUBERS: Each guy is a star in his own right. Gaming, lifestyle, drama, the ones who never show their face. Get close enough and find out who he really is when the camera's off.

● MAKE HIM NOTICE YOU: He has thousands of fans. You have one shot. Go on dates around the city, say the right things, and become the one he actually thinks about.

● KEEP THE CHAT GOING: Text him between dates. Don't go cold. Guys who get a lot of attention drop fast the ones who don't keep up.

● UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE IMAGES: The closer he lets you in, the more he shares. Things his subscribers will never see.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Not every story ends the same. How far you get depends entirely on you.


A guy with millions of eyes on him.
Completely out of reach.
Or is he?

Prove you're worth his time.
70010000123846.intro:
Millions watch him.
Do you think you can make him look at you?
70010000123846.name: Youtuber Boys: Love Behind the Camera

70010000126710.description:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track brings chaotic local and online multiplayer track-building action to the next level – band together with friends to collaborate and build your track across new procedurally generated worlds - WHILST the train is running! So think fast, with more freedom than ever before, and conquer new obstacles in your way - before your trains becomes… a trainwreck! 

CHOOSE YOUR TRACK 
Now featuring a story spread across new environments, on branching paths for you to choose, so no two runs will feel the same. In these biomes you’ll now be able encounter new points of interests, side quests, daunting bosses and as well as other random encounters, so adapt quickly on your feet! New unlockable cosmetics also let you add your personal touch to your characters’ story. 

YOUR JOURNEY GETS BETTER AND BETTER 
Every excursion your crew undertakes feels increasingly meaningful, with new rewards and permanent upgrades granting you character with gameplay-modifying abilities, as well as new train engines, wagons and extensions to unlock, giving you the tools to build a multitude of train configurations to play and experiment with. Each locomotive loss is an opportunity to rebuild and get… back on track! 

CREATE, SHARE AND PLAY WITH THE COMMUNITY 
The all-new Terrain Conductor mode allows you unleash your imagination to create your very own custom maps and share these with the Unrailed community – with highlights being featured by the developers. Or if creating isn’t your thing, browse the limitless creations other players have built, so the frantic fun never ends! 

CO-OPERATE TO COMPETE 
Fulfill your burning competitive urge – manically duke it out in against another team in the new 8-player Vs Mode. Test your team’s prowess in online leaderboards with action replays and see who can achieve the highest scores.
70010000126710.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000126710.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000127278.description:
A peaceful picnic turns into a big adventure when Judy wakes up to find her house key gone!

Run, jump, slip, and explore through colorful forests, golden cities, metallic sewers, and secret filled areas in this charming retro platforming adventure.

Features:
• Over 140 levels in 8 colorful areas!
• 4 challenges for skilled players
• Many charming NPCs
• Hidden Game Girls to find
• Unlockable art, music, and more
70010000127278.intro: Judy’s house key has been stolen by a mysterious hand, and now she needs your help to get it back!
70010000127278.name: Judy's Adventure DX

70050000071077.description:
Prepare for a journey to a galaxy far, far away! Whether you’re bartering in the desert sands or marching in formation, these pre-order bonuses will make your next game night feel like you’ve scavenged treasure in the Outer Rim.

Pre-Order Bonus
Don’t miss out! Lock in your pre-order now to expand your collection with two legendary dice skins inspired by two of the galaxy’s iconic characters:

Jawa: Roll with the resourcefulness of a Tatooine scavenger. Perfect for finding luck in the most unlikely places!

Stormtrooper: Bring order to the board with the iconic Galactic Empire soldier. Don’t worry – these dice won’t miss their target!
70050000071077.name: Roll in Style: Pre-Order Bonus Dice Skins

70050000073475.description: This is an Upgrade Pack, if you already own Unrailed 2: Back on Track for Nintendo Switch™, you can upgrade to the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition using this product.
70050000073475.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
