70050000073475.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70070000036632.description:
Step into the paws of a mischievous stray cat and experience a world where every moment is an opportunity for fun, chaos, and discovery. Explore lively urban backyards, complete playful tasks, interact with other cats, and turn ordinary surroundings into your personal playground.

This bundle includes main title and Skyfall Paradise DLC which not only lets you live the carefree life of a curious feline but also transforms how your adventure feels. With a brand-new skybox included, the world above you comes alive in fresh and atmospheric tones — from bright and cheerful to calm and magical — adding a whole new layer of immersion to every jump, dig, and stroll.
70070000036632.intro: Turn every yard into your playground.
70070000036632.name: Bodycam Stray Kitty Gold Edition

70070000036781.description:
Embark on a heartwarming journey with adorable kitties in Little Paws: Kitty Cat Simulator, a relaxing adventure filled with exploration, discovery, and playful charm. Travel across the world, from lively city streets to peaceful beaches and snowy mountaintops, collecting fish, uncovering secrets, and enjoying delightful interactions along the way.

This bundle includes main title and Cute Friend DLC  which adds an extra touch of cuteness to your adventure. Give your kitty a fresh and adorable new look, making every moment even more charming as you explore, play, and relax in cozy environments around the globe.

Discover new places, express your style, and enjoy the ultimate cozy cat experience.
70070000036781.intro: A cozy adventure full of charm and wonder!
70070000036781.name: Little Paws: Kitty Cat GOLD EDITION

70010000119627.description:
Astrid wakes up in Purgatory and she doesn't remember anything. 

Point and click your way through adventure-based gameplay mixed with visual novel storytelling. Solve the mystery of our heroine's unexplained and unusual death. 

Experience a heartfelt story where your choices matter, with five different interactive routes. Feel your way through a charming, funny, dramatic and moving narrative full of compelling characters, brought to life by partial voice acting.


Features:
* Visual novel narrative with choices
* Point and click adventure gameplay
* Beautiful, unique art style
* Unlock 70+ hidden items
* Partial voice acting
* Original soundtrack composed by Endigo
70010000119627.intro: Solve the mystery of Astrid’s untimely demise in this visual novel.
70010000119627.name: Pitstop in Purgatory

70010000121583.description:
Transform empty rooms into warm, cozy spaces in Cozy Home Unpacking - a relaxing organization and decoration simulator where every box hides a new story. Unpack furniture, place decorations, organize everyday items, and slowly turn simple apartments into beautiful homes filled with comfort and personality.

Take your time as you decorate bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, and tiny cozy corners exactly the way you want. Arrange books, plants, posters, kitchenware, toys, and dozens of charming objects while enjoying a calm atmosphere and satisfying gameplay.

With soft visuals, relaxing vibes, and stress-free gameplay, Cozy Home Unpacking is the perfect experience for players who love decorating, organizing, and creating peaceful spaces.
70010000121583.intro: Make Every Room Feel Like Home.
70010000121583.name: Cozy Home Unpacking

70010000123214.description:
Explore a quiet and cozy office from the perspective of a curious little cat in Little Kitty Meow, a relaxing adventure focused on atmosphere, exploration, and peaceful wandering.

Walk through office rooms, meeting areas, corridors, and workspaces while discovering hidden corners, cozy spots, and small environmental details that bring the workplace to life. Enjoy calm exploration, soft visuals, and a comforting atmosphere as you freely roam through the office at your own pace.

With relaxing gameplay and charming environments, Little Kitty Meow offers a simple and wholesome experience perfect for players who enjoy cozy exploration games.
70010000123214.name: Little Kitty Meow

70010000123673.description:
BECOME ONE WITH YOUR UMBRELLA!
A fast-paced Aerial Roguelite Hack and Slash where Insane Combos and pure aggression are all that stand between you and death. Step into the paws of a Raincoat Cat and face an infernal journey with nothing but your Umbrella as a Weapon!

EVOLVE OR TURN TO ASHES
Dive into merciless stages Packed with Enemies and Insane Upgrades. The deeper you go into Hell, the more aggressive you must be. Evolve your umbrella, destroy everything in your path, and forge your own combat style

MAIN FEATURES
5 Unique Umbrellas to massacre enemies in different ways

Over 60 Devastating Upgrades to transform your playstyle

Smash hordes of demonic eyes with aerial combos

Collect Pupils to unlock 12 Types of Permanent Upgrades

Use Blood Drops to intensify your playstyle and become even deadlier

DO YOU HAVE THE STOMACH FOR THIS?
Survive endless swarms of demonic eyes, push your skills to the limit, crush your own records, and conquer the top of the Global Leaderboard

Are you ready to carve your path through the underworld and reclaim your soul?
70010000123673.intro: Put on your raincoat and destroy hordes of demons in Hell. Use 5 insane umbrellas in an aerial roguelite hack and slash of pure chaos!
70010000123673.name: Hellbrella

70070000037005.description:
Travel the world and sharpen your detective skills with the ultimate Spy Guy vacation bundle! Explore the vibrant streets of Rome, discover the sunny coasts of Croatia, uncover secrets among the ancient wonders of Greece, and dive into the colorful atmosphere of Indonesia.

This special collection includes:

Spy Guy Roma
Spy Guy Croatia
Spy Guy Greece
Spy Guy Indonesia
Spy Guy Seaside

Each adventure is packed with hidden objects, charming locations, and exciting mysteries to solve. Become an even greater detective as you travel across breathtaking holiday destinations and help Spy Guy crack every case!
70070000037005.name: Spy Guy Vacation Bundle

70050000045574.description: Clue - Neon Noir includes a Location, 6 Suspects, 4 Customisation Items, and 6 Tokens to unlock!
70050000045574.name: Clue - Neon Noir

70010000121204.description:
Feeling lucky? Step into the Grand Vegas Casino and try your hand at 4 of the most popular gambling games in the world, with no need to get dressed up or risk your wallet! Grand Vegas Casino is a casual gambling simulation game for players of all skill levels, offering intuitive controls and a fluidly animated HD-2D graphic style to keep you immersed in luxurious high-rolling action.

Build your strategy, improve your skills, place daring bets and experiment to win. Featured casino games include Poker, Roulette, Blackjack and Slots, each with unique mechanics and standard rules that have made them timeless staples of the gambling scene. Play against computer-controlled opponents and unlock cool rewards as you progress! Are you ready to go all in?

• Play Poker, Blackjack, Roulette and Slots using standard casino rules!
• Experiment, strategize and easily restart if you run out of money.
• Collect rewards for defeating AI opponents!
• Enjoy crisp and colorful HD presentation in fluidly animated 2D style.
70010000121204.intro: Become a gambling master without the financial risk as you test your skills in the world's most popular casino games!
70010000121204.name: Grand Vegas Casino

70010000060617.description: Outsmart and outgun your opponent in R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos, the ultimate turn-based sci-fi strategy collection! This two-game combination of the classic R-Type Tactics titles arrives on modern consoles for the first time, equipped with an armada of unique units to deploy across dozens of levels. Multiple campaigns allow you to take on the Bydo Empire or even play as them yourself. Their fates are up to you!
70010000060617.intro: The fate of two races depends on you.
70010000060617.name: R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos

70010000100975.description:
#DRIVE Rally is an arcade-inspired rally racing game set in the golden racing era of the 1990s. Grab your co-driver and burn rubber in iconic, race-winning cars across varied rally stages and terrains in some of the most recognizable rallying locations in the world—perfect for fans of retro racing games and newcomers alike.

From the sunny landscapes of Dry Crumbs, through the whispering woods of Holzberg, to the chilly wilderness of Revontuli; take a journey through a diverse world you haven’t experienced in racing games before. Each destination delivers distinctive stage design and visual flair that celebrate classic ’90s rally vibes.

Jump behind the wheel of legendary rally cars, including Das Holzwagen, The Doggo, The Bobond, and many more. Build and customize your cars from the ground up to match your driving style and rally your way. Personalize the body, paintwork, and decals, then add that cherry on top with custom decorations - create a ride that feels truly your own.

Don’t forget the co-driver! Your co-driver can be your biggest cheerleader and toughest judge. It’s a partnership that thrives on performance and emotion. Their goal is to assist your runs with helpful navigation and tips to improve your stage times - making every run feel dynamic and replayable.

Features
• The spirit of ’90s rally for players of all ages and generations

• Exciting driving mechanics, simple to start but demanding in depth

• Stunning rally tracks and locations inspired by the world

• Retro-inspired cars with awesome personalization and car customization options

• Compete on online leaderboards to be the best and prove your rally skills
70010000100975.intro: Put your foot down and redefine speed in #DRIVE Rally!
70010000100975.name: #DRIVE Rally

70010000104583.description:
From the hidden pages of Jurnal Risa comes a visual novel where the boundary between the living and the unseen begins to blur. Step into Jurnal Risa's world where each shadow holds a story, and every whisper leads you deeper into the unknown.

Witness the resurrection of the foretold nemesis of the Jurnal Risa crew, which was never revealed before. Unveil its dark destiny within this horror-adventure game.

This is the tale of Jurnal Risa, as recounted to me by Risa herself.

Key features

• A Paranormal Adventure Mystery

Jurnal Risa is known for exploring haunted places and sharing true ghost stories from Indonesia. Their adventures, bonds, and spiritual encounters inspire the game’s mystery and emotional depth.

• Brought to Life with Full Voice Acting

Fully voiced by the real members of the group, each scene feels authentic as it captures their unique personalities, real-life bonds, and the emotional weight behind every supernatural encounter.

• Mini games

Take a break from the tension with fun mini-games.

• Collect the Fragments of the Past

Gather collectible photos as you complete stories and challenges. Each photo unlocks a memory or reveals a hidden piece of the mystery.


Ready to turn the last page and face what lingers beyond?
70010000104583.intro: Witness the resurrection of the foretold nemesis of the Jurnal Risa family, which was never revealed before. Unveil its dark destiny within this horror-adventure game.
70010000104583.name: Jurnal Risa: Dark Destiny

70010000106637.description:
With brilliant visuals by Shio-Koji and a story composed by Akeo, the yuri visual novel "UsoNatsu -The Summer Romance Bloomed From A Lie-" is coming to Nintendo Switch™!
2D animation gives the girls a perky liveliness as their engrossing romance is brought to you fully voiced!

2D animations create a more immersive story!
Details such as hand gestures and flowing hair are expressed in the 2D animations, granting the characters more realism and depth of emotion.

Includes the full version of the opening theme!
The full version of the opening theme, "sun shade", is included.
It becomes accessible from the MUSIC option in the main menu after finishing the story.

Playable in three languages!
The text can be set to English, Simplified Chinese, or Japanese (audio is in Japanese only).
This includes in-game text, options, and the digital manual. Language settings can be changed at any time."

Enjoy full HD visuals!
Experience the game in high-definition 1920x1080 resolution by playing in TV Mode.

Touch screen controls and Nintendo Switch Lite are also supported.

Game System
There are no choice-based story branching elements in this visual novel.
You simply watch the story unfold like turning the pages of a book or enjoying an anime or movie.

Story
One night, Tachibana Kaoru, a second-year student at Aoba Dai-ichi High School in Minatocho, confesses her love to her middle school homeroom teacher, Shimotsuki Mirei, only to have her heart broken.
To make matters worse, the moment is witnessed by Minagi Shiori, a diligent classmate of Kaoru's and a model student.
On the brink of despair, Kaoru confides in Shiori about her painful past with Mirei.
Shiori listens silently and then enigmatically posits a peculiar question:
"Instead of forgetting someone you cared about... do you think it's possible to simply overwrite those memories with different ones?"
As their relationship blossoms, Inohara Riku—another student in the same grade and secret admirer of Shiori—also becomes involved, and the three begin to weave the tale of their summer together...

Staff
Original Art: Shio-Koji
Scenario: Akeo

Cast
Tachibana Kaoru    VA: Koichi Makoto
Minagi Shiori    VA: Iwami Manaka
Inohara Riku   VA: Fujimura Konomi
Shimotsuki Mirei    VA: Matsui Eriko
Asahi Kayo    VA: Shibasaki Noriko
Tachibana Koharu   VA: Makita Tsugumi
Tachibana Atsushi   VA: Kageura Daisuke
Minagi Naomasa   VA: Watanabe Hiroshi
*Fully voiced (including the protagonist)
70010000106637.intro: In the midst of their lively school days, three high school girls and one female teacher must contend with confused emotions and harbored LIES...
70010000106637.name: UsoNatsu -The Summer Romance Bloomed From A Lie-

70010000119817.description: Learn to react quickly to unconventional situations. Maneuver your way through sneaky enemies and use your attacks to destroy planetary defenses.
70010000119817.intro: Fire up your blasters and smash through any planet's defenses!
70010000119817.name: Planet Divers

70010000121245.description:
Welcome to Enterprise Corp.
We are pleased to have you.

Your job is simple. You must press the button when the system instructs you to do so.

The system will evaluate your punctuality, consistency, and ability to follow instructions.
Good performance will result in promotions within the corporate hierarchy.
Poor performance will have immediate consequences.

There is no need to understand the internal workings of the processes.
All relevant information will be provided when appropriate.

The system does not make mistakes.
The system records every action.

Thank you for your interest in becoming part of Enterprise Corp.

In “Just. Press. The Button.”, every action counts and every decision defines you. Explore a world where obedience to rules is not optional and promotions come with increasing expectations. "Just. Press. The Button." places you face to face with routine and constant corporate pressure as you attempt to maintain your position within the hierarchy.

Prepare for a dystopian experience that blends the race for success, monotony, tension, and the consequences of every step, all while the system watches, evaluates, and records your every move.
70010000121245.name: Just. Press. The Button.

70010000121290.description:
The World Cup has been stolen by aliens and it's up to you to get it back! 

Soccer Kid is an innovative 2D platformer that challenges you to navigate the world using only your soccer skills. Instead of just running and jumping, you'll need to dribble, header, and kick your way through enemies and obstacles across the globe.

This QUByte Classics edition brings the ultimate nostalgic package to your Nintendo Switch™.
70010000121290.intro: A classic platformer where your soccer ball is your weapon!
70010000121290.name: Soccer Kid Collection (QUByte Classics)

70010000123394.description:
Enter a surreal platforming adventure where the world constantly changes around you. This is more than a journey through obstacles - it’s a challenge where the environment itself becomes part of the puzzle.

Using the power of a rotating, you’ll manipulate the world to find new paths, avoid dangers, and uncover hidden ways forward. Every level introduces fresh challenges that test your reflexes, timing, and ability to adapt to changing surroundings.

Collect coins, overcome mind-bending platforming sequences, and take on intense encounters where the entire arena shifts and moves beneath your feet. Some stages demand speed and precision, while others reward careful observation and creative thinking.

Blending dynamic gameplay, puzzle-solving, and fast-paced action, this adventure invites you to master a world where nothing stays still for long.
70010000123394.name: Inversion: The Single Path

70010000123207.description:
Infiltrate a luxury hotel and complete different tasks. Quiet paws and a bit of attitude are all you need for success!

- A Cat’s Eye View
See the world from just four inches off the ground. Explore the cozy hotel lobby as a curious little cat, wandering through warm lounges, reception areas, sofas, plants, luggage corners, and decorative spaces filled with charm and relaxing atmosphere.

- Cozy Hotel Atmosphere
Enjoy a calm and peaceful experience focused on exploration and cozy vibes. Soft lighting, relaxing music, and detailed interiors turn the hotel hall into a warm and comforting place perfect for quiet adventures.

- Playful Exploration
Jump onto counters, walk across furniture, rest in cozy corners, and freely explore the hotel lobby at your own pace. Every small detail of the environment helps create a relaxing and charming experience.

- A Warm Living Space
The entire game takes place inside a hotel hall designed to feel alive, stylish, and welcoming. From the reception desk to lounge areas and decorative corners, the lobby is filled with cozy visual details and relaxing ambiance.
70010000123207.intro: A charming adventure from a cat's perspective.
70010000123207.name: Strays POV Tales

70010000124694.description:
No roads. No limits. Only the path you choose.

Take control of powerful 4x4 vehicles and explore wild, unpredictable environments where every decision matters. In Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator, the focus is not speed — it’s control, planning, and the ability to overcome challenging terrain.

Drive through mud, snow, sand, and rocky landscapes where each surface affects your movement and forces you to adapt. Choosing the right path becomes essential as you navigate through difficult conditions, avoid hazards, and complete missions in remote locations.

Every mission is an expedition. You deliver cargo, locate objectives, rescue targets, and explore unknown areas while managing your vehicle’s performance. Damage, terrain resistance, and route selection all impact your progress, making each journey a test of skill and patience.

There are no fixed roads — you decide how to reach your destination. Explore different routes, discover hidden areas, and uncover pieces of a larger story as you move through diverse environments inspired by real-world locations

Key Features:
	•	Drive through terrain that constantly pushes your control
	•	Plan your route instead of following fixed roads
	•	Complete missions built around exploration and precision
	•	Manage your vehicle and overcome natural obstacles
	•	Progress through increasingly demanding environments
Take your time, choose your path, and push your limits.
In Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator, every journey is about control, strategy, and exploration.
70010000124694.name: Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator

70070000036733.intro: Enjoy 3 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!
70070000036733.name: EnjoyUp‘s 3 in 1

70070000037018.description:
Pets and Friends: Summer Vibes is a cozy sticker album that lets you create your own charming collages inspired by the magic of summer. Arrange unique compositions, decorate beautiful pages, and design delightful artworks filled with adorable animals and sunny decorations.

Enjoy relaxing gameplay perfect for long summer evenings, express your creativity, and have fun with additional mini-games. Along the way, you’ll also discover interesting animal facts that make every moment in the game even more special.

Pets and Friends: Summer Vibes is the perfect experience for fans of cozy games, creative fun, and warm vacation vibes.
70070000037018.name: Pets and Friends Summer Vibes

70050000056421.description: Adds Character 4 to the roster of playable characters.
70050000056421.name: Additional Character 4

70010000103344.description:
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb. Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history
70010000103344.intro: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...
70010000103344.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim

70010000114910.description:
MAMIYA - A Shared Illusion of the World's End - is a dark mystery visual novel made by the indie developer Kenkou Land.
Containing all three parts of the story, it lets you experience a world of characters guided by fate towards various conclusions.

●synopsis
Tokyo, during the year in which the world was prophesied to end.

As we clung to reality, too spineless to throw our lives away together, we met MAMIYA.

At a friend's funeral, the entire crowd was weeping and mourning, while we thought to ourselves that the death of a single person had no meaningful impact on the world at large.
We slept, woke up, and went through the same daily grind as ever. At least, that's how it was supposed to be.

Then MAMIYA appeared...

Before we even knew it, the mysterious child named MAMIYA had wormed their way into our daily lives. They slowly, but surely, became something of an emotional support. They'd brought us down a new path.

A path that would surely lead us to our deaths...

●Added Content
・Additional illustrations for the story!
・The long-awaited full voice acting!
As a voice actor, we have hired Soyogi-Soyogi !
・The Switch version also contains an original minigame to win "what-if" stories!
70010000114910.intro: It doesn't matter if my love goes unnoticed—I am always on your side.
70010000114910.name: MAMIYA - A Shared Illusion of the World's End -

70010000119729.description:
Burn rubber, fire rockets, and survive the arena in this explosive combat racing experience.

RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme throws you into a post-apocalyptic world of armored cars, deadly tracks, and all-out vehicular warfare. Every race is a battle where speed, firepower, and survival decide who rules the arena.

Play solo or challenge friends in local split-screen mode and prove who dominates the battlefield.

Pick from 21 unique cars, each with its own ultimate ability, upgrade path, and special body kits. Choose your class - SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, or CRUSHER - and master a wide arsenal of abilities, from rocket salvos and mini-missiles to teleport swaps, laser drones, flamethrowers, ghost summons, freezing blasts, and electric traps.

Race through 7 locations, face 5 unique bosses, and test your skills across Career, Event, Season, and Split-Screen modes. Every boss features distinct mechanics and attack patterns, from rocket barrages and enemy summons to teleport strikes, poison shots, and ice crystal traps.

With a variety of mission types and deep upgrade systems, every run offers a new way to dominate the road.

Event mode features tournaments built around specific cars, where you build your run by choosing skill cards between stages and survive with a single shared HP bar.

Season mode introduces daily challenges and leaderboards - complete missions, set records, and earn rewards.

Features:
• 20+ hours of combat racing in Career mode
• 21 unique cars with ultimate abilities
• 3 car classes: SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, CRUSHER
• 4 game modes: Career, Event, Season, Split-Screen
• 7 distinct locations and 5 unique bosses
• Wide range of weapons, abilities, and upgrades
• Local split-screen multiplayer on one console
70010000119729.intro: Jump into explosive combat racing where every track is a battlefield and every rival is a target.
70010000119729.name: RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme

70010000119811.description: Making a sandwich is not as easy as it seems. There are many obstacles to overcome in the kitchen to make a delicious meal. You have to be sure to use all the tasty ingredients in the right order. Give it a try and see if you can do it!
70010000119811.intro: Want to know how sandwiches are really made?
70010000119811.name: Run, Sandwich, Run!

70010000122559.description:
Welcome to The Artifactory, a fast-paced couch co-op party game where teamwork, creativity, and a little factory chaos keep the production line moving.

Work together with up to four players to gather materials, craft items, and assemble loot boxes before the delivery trucks leave. Pass ingredients along conveyor belts, organize the production line, and keep the factory running smoothly.

But crafting isn’t just about following recipes. Experiment with different raw materials to discover new item combinations and unlock new ways to produce goods. The more you explore, the more efficient your factory can become.

Each level introduces new challenges — moving platforms, tricky conveyor layouts, and unpredictable obstacles that will test your coordination and communication.

Whether you are playing with friends, family, or going solo, every shift at the factory turns into a hilarious cooperative challenge where timing, teamwork, and quick thinking make all the difference.

Can your team master the machines and keep the deliveries on schedule?

Key Features
Local couch co-op for up to 4 players
Experiment with materials to discover new crafting recipes
Build and manage chaotic production lines
Creative factory environments with unique mechanics
Fast, cooperative party gameplay
Perfect for family game nights and multiplayer sessions
70010000122559.intro: Team up in a chaotic factory where crafting, experimentation, and fast teamwork keep the production line alive.
70010000122559.name: The Artifactory

70010000123973.description:
INCOMING BROADCAST
"Welcome to Rabbithole City, where all animals live a fulfilling life outside nature in this modern, neon-lit city - and it's all thanks to the mightiest species of all: bunnies! A few years ago, they brought us technological progress and a life of fun and pleasure. 

And the small price for such a life? Leaving your filthy natural habitat and your instincts behind. Especially you, carnivores, should change your ways if you want to be accepted in this glorious society. "


FREE THE OPRESSED
Not everyone agrees with the bunnies and many species are suffering under this strict rabbit regime.

You are recruited by a giant Owl who needs your help to sabotage the Bunny Tyranny. He gives you control over the body of a tiger-lynx, Kiyo, and sends you on various stealth and platforming missions to uncover the bunnies’ wicked plans. To avoid the merciless rabbit police, you'll need to make clever decisions about when to be stealthy or violent, or both. Hide in the dynamic shadows, use distractions, attacks, and ninja rope acrobatics, and don't get caught!


THE NIGHTLIFE IS CALLING
Take your time and get lost in the atmosphere of Rabbithole City. Learn more about life in this world, meet colorful characters, explore different locations, and discover how evil the bunnies really are.

Feel the seductive pull of the neon lights and immersive synth-wave beats, but be careful - do not lose sight of your mission.
70010000123973.intro: Kiyo, a feline ex-predator, is trapped in a neon-lit, dystopian city dominated by smartphone-addicted bunnies. Infiltrate the bunnies' facilities and free everyone from their tyrannical grip.
70010000123973.name: KIYO - Bunny Tyranny

70050000070102.description:
This DLC unlocks a brand new world for hexceed: Centaurus! 
Puzzle your way through 140 brand-new levels!
70050000070102.intro: Unlocks a new world for hexceed: Centaurus brings 140 new puzzles and includes all mechanics from the previous DLC.
70050000070102.name: Centaurus

70050000070551.description:
Between Worlds
Not all places are meant to be destinations. The Train Station is a place of arrivals, departures, and fleeting encounters. Mortals pass through, never feeling safe, as though they are being watched. Platforms fade into the darkness. The tunnels echo with distant sounds from the past and the present. Panic spreads faster than the Phantom Train Conductor can operate his locomotive.

Introducing a new Train Station level built upon crowds, open spaces, and relentless motion. No place ever feels secure.

Introducing a new game mode: Second Side of the Coin.

For the first time, step into the role of a Ghost-breaker who hunts ghosts, sets traps, and experiences fear from the other side—where control is fleeting and fragile, resources are limited, and every mistake means punishment.
70050000070551.name: Between Worlds

70050000073547.description:
This Diorama set includes the following: 

- 20 New levels

- 20 Hidden jigsaw pieces to complete 4 new collectibles!

- 40 New stickers to decorate your photos!
70050000073547.intro: Discover and find the differences in the new handcrafted diorama set from Tiny Lands 2.
70050000073547.name: Diorama set 1

70050000073664.description:
Expand your garage with the RACE - Razor Pack!

Razor is a fast Speedster-class combat car built for high-speed arena racing. With a sharp futuristic body, cutting-edge combat gear, and a lightweight design, it is made to strike fast and outmaneuver rivals on post-apocalyptic tracks.

Its ultimate ability, Blade Storm, surrounds the car with a storm of blades, damaging enemies on collision.

This DLC includes:
- Razor car
- 6 vinyls
- 6 flags
- 4 avatars

Vinyls and flags can be used on any unlocked car.
70050000073664.intro: Unlock the Razor car and exclusive customization items.
70050000073664.name: RACE - Razor Pack

70050000046329.description: The Painted Red Crime Scene includes a Location, 6 Suspects, 4 Customisation Items, and 6 Tokens to unlock!
70050000046329.name: Clue - Painted Red

70050000060827.description:
Delve deeper into the eerie lands of The Spiral. 

This additional tale enriches the experience and lets you uncover hidden secrets, new perspectives, and unexpected horrors.
70050000060827.name: Little Nightmares III - First Additional Chapter

70010000113010.description:
A 2D pixel art roguelike space shooter with plugged resource management, procedural levels and challenging bosses! Hold the controls tight and do not get stranded in the void!

PLUG 'N' SHOOT

- Plug in to recharge your energy and manage your resources.
- Be Careful! Once plugged, you'll only be able to move within the range of your cable!
- Space is plunged into darkness, activate the spacesockets to clear a level and travel to the next sector.

FIGHT

- Choose between 10+ different ships with different gameplay modes!
- Blast your mega-laser!
- Form an army of rescued stranded ships that will fight alongside you!
- Destroy the stages and defeat a large variety of enemies!
- Encounter dangerous and challenging BOSSES after each galaxy in your quest.

SLOW DOWN TIME

Holding the breach, dodging enemy bullets, and piloting through narrow hallways shouldn't be a problem, BUT just in case...
- Your ship is equipped with a futuristic Slow-Mo System that you can use almost whenever you want!
- Luckily for you, it recharges by collecting energy from dead enemies!

UPGRADE

- Pick up BATTERIES and discover +250 combinations of bullet modifiers!
- Get CHIPS of temporary upgrades by destroying enemies!
- Choose between more than 40 upgrades for your ship.
- Optimize charge times, improve your firepower, get more cable length...
- Become invisible to enemies.

And more!
70010000113010.intro: Hyperwired is a roguelike top-down action shooter, where your spaceship has a plug hanging from it.
70010000113010.name: HYPERWIRED

70010000122818.description: Get ready to use your ears! Time your button presses to the beat in this broad collection of rhythm games that are easy to learn and rewarding to master. Chop flying veggies, bounce fruit off your biceps, flap along with birds in flight, and more as you focus on catchy original music—including tracks by renowned Japanese musician Tsunku.
70010000122818.intro: Tune in and groove to a variety of games that will challenge your rhythm
70010000122818.name: Rhythm Heaven™ Groove

70010000125188.description: Gather, control, and lead your army on the road to glory. No obstacle can stop you. Prepare for the final battle and defeat every opponent along the way. Lead the army with care - your soldiers believe in you!
70010000125188.intro: Gather and lead your army to the finish line! Face your enemies and win the battle!
70010000125188.name: The Boys Escape

70070000036709.description:
This pack includes the games:

-Rock ´N Racing Off Road DX
-Golf Up
-Darts Up
-Touchdown Pinball
70070000036709.intro: Enjoy 4 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!
70070000036709.name: 4 in 1 Sports Bundle Vol 3

70010000122161.description:
Create the workspace of your dreams in My Cozy Workspace - a relaxing simulator where creativity, comfort, and productivity come together. Design and customize rooms by placing furniture, organizing accessories, decorating shelves, and building a cozy atmosphere that feels uniquely yours.

Arrange desks, plants, books, lights, and dozens of decorative items while transforming small empty spaces into inspiring work, whether you prefer a minimalist office, a colorful creative studio, or a warm workspace corner.

Take your time, experiment with different layouts, and enjoy a calm and satisfying experience focused on creativity and relaxation.
70010000122161.intro: Build the workspace you’ve always dreamed of!
70010000122161.name: My Cozy Workspace

70010000124875.description: New gameplay of the classic snake game. Collect the color you need to complete the levels. Pick up boosts to make things easier. Change skins to make your snake look stylish and unique!
70010000124875.intro: A mix of Snakes and Colors for an exciting gameplay experience!
70010000124875.name: Color Snake

70010000110953.description:
Digimon Story Time Stranger is an RPG with monster-taming elements that explores the deep bond between humans and Digimon in an epic story that unravels the mystery of the world’s collapse.

Embark on an adventure that spans across the human world and Digital World, collecting and raising a diverse array of Digimon to fight in turn-based battles.

An Epic Story of Connection
Tokyo, Japan – An agent of a secret organization encounters an unknown creature shortly before a city-leveling explosion. They then reawaken eight years in the past...
Take on a mission to uncover the mystery of the world’s collapse, where chance encounters with unique characters will shape your journey across time and parallel worlds - and change fate itself.

Adventure Between Worlds and Time
Journey between the parallel human world and the Digital World: Iliad where Digimon reside. Explore the Digital World and its intricately detailed realms and discover all of its secrets.

Strategic Turn-Based Battles
Enjoy dynamic turn-based combat that combines strategic elements with evolved battle components. More than 450 Digimon and deep customization options provide limitless ways to approach the challenges of battle and reveal the strength of the bonds formed with your Digimon.

*This product is the Standard Edition. A Deluxe Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
70010000110953.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger

Receive the Pre-Order Bonus Pack with trainable Digimon, usable items, and a costume.

Receive Costume Public Safety Suit (Protagonist) and unlocks a side mission which rewards Special Supplies Set.

70050000068983.description:
Change in-game BGM in Digimon Story Time Stranger to your favorite BGM from Digimon Story Cyber Sleuth!

*This product is also included in bundles. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
70050000068983.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger - Cyber Sleuth BGM Pack

70050000068985.description:
Receive Early Unlock for a special Agumon and special Gabumon with their Digivolution conditions already unlocked. The special Agumon and special Gabumon can Digivolve into Agumon (Bond of Bravery) and Gabumon (Bond of Friendship) respectively.

70050000068985.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger - Early Unlock: Special Agumon & Gabumon

70010000105215.description:
Explore the depths of this massive dungeon with your adorable companion Una in this exciting  ROGUE-like deck-building adventure!
Game feature:
• Dynamic Dungeon Layout
Fight through randomly-generated monster-filled dungeons and encounter merchants, treasures and story events. You can only see three levels down, so choose wisely as you push deeper into the dungeon.

• Titillating Card Battles
Build the most powerful deck out of over 50 different cards and 20 different runes and use it to overwhelm your enemies! 

• Random Treasure
Obtain random treasures to upgrade Una's abilities. Put together the strongest combination and synergize it with your deck to deal ungodly amounts of damage!

• An Exciting Story with Multiple Endings
Make choices and experience different endings in this exciting adventure story! Unlock different side stories to trigger various card enchantments. Some enchantments might come in handy, while others might hurt you!
70010000105215.intro: Build your deck and take Una on an epic dungeon adventure!
70010000105215.name: Take Me To The Dungeon!!

70010000120066.description:
Punch and dodge* to the beat in the latest entry of the Fitness Boxing series, now with performance enhancements and additional content for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system! Pair up with your choice of nine fully voiced virtual instructors with customizable outfits and hairstyles—and then get your groove on in 30 instrumental songs, some of which are inspired by catchy pop tunes.

Jump into a single Quick Workout, or build an exercise routine that fits your life. Additions to the series include Mitt Drills to practice combos with your instructor and Sit Fit Boxing to work up a sweat without leaving your seat. Whether you’re after a serious burn or just a bit of stretching, the intensity of your workout is up to you!

The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition has a faster frame rate and enhanced resolution. It also adds an Advanced Scoring Mode that takes the timing of your hits into account, a Boost Up feature that gradually increases the speed of your workout with each round, and CameraPlay** support so you can see your movements on screen.

Invite a friend to join your workout via GameShare

If you have the Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game, you can share the game with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 system using GameShare*** via local wireless to work out side by side.

Already have Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer for Nintendo Switch? Purchase the upgrade pack!   

If you already have the game for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the upgrade pack**** separately to play this version on Nintendo Switch 2.
70010000120066.intro: A workout that fits your lifestyle—now enhanced for the Nintendo Switch 2 system!
70010000120066.name: Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000124869.description: Command and control your own horde of zombies to defeat your opponents and become the greatest in the arenas. Collect weak humans and turn them into your weapons. The larger your undead army, the greater your chances of domination.
70010000124869.intro: Lead your undead legion to the world domination!
70010000124869.name: Zombie Legion

70050000073921.description:
Enhance your Fitness Boxing experience with this upgrade pack*. Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition features a faster frame rate, increased resolution, and some additional content!

Push your training to the next level with an Advanced Scoring Mode that takes the timing of your hits into account, or a Boost Up feature that gradually increases the speed of your workout with each round. You can also see your movements on screen with the added CameraPlay** support.

Invite a friend to join your workout via GameShare

If you have upgraded to the Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition game , you can share the game with anyone who has a Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2 system using GameShare*** via local wireless to work out side by side.
70050000073921.intro: Upgrade your workout for the Nintendo Switch 2 system
70050000073921.name: Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000122748.description:
In a world where the undead have consumed the frontier, survival is the only law left. Step into the boots of a fearless bounty hunter and fight through waves of zombies across cursed towns, abandoned mines, and forgotten wilderness. Unlock powerful survivors, devastating weapons, and loyal companions as you carve your path through the apocalypse.  

- Begin your journey as a lone gunslinger and unlock unique playable characters, each with their own abilities and playstyles.

- Create hundreds of powerful build combinations using a perk system that enhances weapons, triggers explosions, and unleashes elemental powers such as lightning, fire, and ice.

- Fight alongside loyal companions with unique abilities. Some pets strengthen your attacks and skills, while others bring powerful combat abilities of their own.

- Survive against massive zombie hordes, deadly elite enemies, and terrifying bosses that will challenge your reflexes, positioning, and strategy.

- Explore diverse locations ranging from abandoned western towns and graveyards to dark mines, cursed forests, and forgotten frontier outposts. Every location introduces new dangers, secrets, and gameplay opportunities.

- Wield a massive arsenal of weapons, from classic revolvers and lever-action rifles to experimental creations like Tesla gun and explosive heavy weaponry.

- Gather resources and experience during every run to upgrade your characters, pets, weapons, and abilities, allowing you to take on increasingly dangerous enemies.

- Immerse yourself in stylized visuals and a soundtrack inspired by the brutal atmosphere of a zombie-infested Wild West.

- Complete missions to unlock locations and gameplay modifiers.
70010000122748.intro: Survive the frontier. Hunt the undead.
70010000122748.name: Wild West Survivors

70010000117929.description:
Overview

Rei, the main character, is a human spirit bound with the challenging duty of defeating mystical entities of nature, the Kami, to obtain their power.

You are free to pick your fights against the Kami in any order. The game features a dynamic difficulty system where each enemy strength is defined by the player’s chosen path. This means that the very same Kami fought at the very beginning could also be the final boss in a different route. Hope to never leave the one you struggle most to fight last!

Combat Features

Besides sword attacks, dodges, head stomps and other basic abilities, Rei will learn a completely new skill for each defeated Kami. Those will provide further depth to your combat arsenal, be it a stronger dash, a weapon that can execute enemies, the ability to heal and many more! 

Player choice is the ultimate power. Taking into account the vastly distinct enemies’ patterns and unique skills granted upon each victory, you will be able to decide how to approach every challenge. It won’t be easy either way, but you can always go back and try something different.

Beyond the Brawl

Gurei is a game about fighting strong enemies, but that’s not all. The Kami inhabit a surreal castle located between the human and spirit worlds. After each victory, Rei comes closer to the realm of spirits, starting to encounter peculiar characters from Japanese mythology. These creatures will add novelty and strangeness to your journey, providing commentary, unique animations, side objectives and obscure secrets.

Unlikely “Friends”

You will get to know the different Kami quite well. When Rei defeats them, she absorbs their power – and their personality. The defeated Kami will be carried around wherever Rei goes, and they’ll surely have stuff to talk about. Sometimes their remarks will be useful information that builds the player’s understanding of the lore and the game mechanics, but sometimes they will be... not so helpful, to put it briefly. Good luck!
70010000117929.intro: An unforgiving game with precise combat. Fight challenging bosses in any order, acquire their unique powers and succeed in your own terms.
70010000117929.name: Gurei

70010000124881.description: A fast-paced racing game where you can test your skills and see how you perform on the track. You have to be really fast and make decisions in milliseconds. Avoid all the obstacles and become number one! Customize your Cubics to win in style!
70010000124881.intro: You can't imagine how fast Cubics can be! Try them out and test your skills.
70010000124881.name: Cubic Riders

70010000096976.description:
Welcome to Kusan: City of Wolves, a brutal top-down shooter set in a neon-drenched urban jungle consumed by violence and corruption.

Kusan delivers hardcore action where one mistake means death. Master gunplay, perfect your movement, survive the streets and combat arenas ruled by furious kingpins that demand speed, precision and flawless execution. Every moment of action is intensified by Korean hip-hop heavyweight Loptimist’s adrenaline-fuelled soundtrack drenched with head-bopping loops and deep 808s pushing you forward without mercy.

You play as Jin, a skilled ex-soldier turned gun-for-hire, living in the heart of a city where the line between predator and prey has already been crossed. This isn’t just another job though, a mysterious girl with immense but uncontrollable power is linked to a violent conspiracy that threatens to shift the balance of power. As chaos erupts, Jin must save the girl, confront his past and the betrayal of a commander he once trusted without question.

Everyone in Kusan wants something and nobody plays fair.

For Jin, there is only one way forward: flawless planning, ruthless execution and saving the girl from criminals while relying only on his wit and unrelenting will to survive the battlefield.

With the whole city at stake, Jin knows it is time to not only clean-house but restore balance.

Dive into Kusan: City of Wolves and descend into a city on the edge. It's more than just a fight, you are the last line between order and oblivion.
70010000096976.intro: A high-octane hardcore top-down shooter set in a brutal urban jungle.
70010000096976.name: Kusan: City of Wolves

70050000070554.description:
Solid Ice and Terror

Escape the bitter cold outside. Screams echo across the ice, celebrating victories and championships of years past.

A massive industrial hockey arena has been abandoned for years. The lights flicker over empty stands and scarred ice. Mortals enter believing their greatest enemy is the polar vortex, however outside something far worse stalks the rink tonight. What looks cute can be just as terrifying. The officials are watching from beyond.

In Canada, hockey is life—even in the afterlife. Something far worse than the cold stalks the rink on this winter evening. The rules of the natural and the supernatural can change without warning. Some will cry for decades. Others are haunted forever.

Introducing a new level set in an industrial Canadian hockey arena somewhere in Canada. We’ll give you 514 guesses where. Every whistle cuts through the darkness, and every decision feels final.

Beware the supernatural official, Jacques Rougeau, who’s on the job.
“Justice isn’t fair. I don’t care if you get screwed over… bon!”
70050000070554.name: Solid Ice and Terror

70010000070278.description:
The extreme tension of infiltrating without being detected.
Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” Immerse yourself in the Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” where you can infiltrate and elude your enemies to complete missions.

The game takes place five years after the Big Shell incident in METAL GEAR SOLID 2: Sons of Liberty, in a world where war has become a business.
To stop Liquid Ocelot's uprising, Solid Snake throws himself into his final battle.
The battle against Liquid and the Patriots draws to a close, and the mysteries woven throughout the series are now revealed!

【STORY】
THE TRANSFORMATION OF WAR INTO BUSINESS.
In an era where PMCs (private military companies) have risen to the top, war has become a business and the driving force behind the world economy. 

Controlling the top five PMCs from behind the scenes is Liquid Ocelot, who fanning the flames of war even further, plans an insurrection with the goal of creating a world where warriors can lead fulfilling lives—a goal shared by none other than Big Boss. 

Under the theme of “Sense” watch as the final battle of the man with Big Boss’s genes, Solid Snake, unfolds.

----------
The Screenplay Book containing in-game text from Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots and the Master Book detailing the story and characters are also included within the game.

[Game]
Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots
*Versions for other regions can be downloaded separately from the store.

[Digital Contents]
Metal Gear Solid 4 Database
Metal Gear Solid 4: Screenplay Book
Metal Gear Solid 4: Master Book
*Accessible via the in-game Start Menu.

----------
【METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1 Save-Data Bonus】
If you have save data from titles included in METAL GEAR SOLID MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1, you can receive in-game items usable in the game as a bonus.

・Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots Bonus: Gold Camouflage

70010000070283.description:
The extreme tension of infiltrating without being detected.
Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” where you avoid combat and complete missions while hiding.

The game take place 10 years after METAL GEAR SOLID 3: Snake Eater.
Amidst the swirling conspiracies behind the East-West Cold War, Snake confronts them while leading a private military force.
This is the story of how one soldier, “Snake”, becomes “Big Boss”.

【STORY】
THE ILLUSION OF PEACE FALTERS

In 1964, after saving the world from all-out nuclear war, Naked Snake, a true hero, receives the name Big Boss, but he disappears shortly after the naming ceremony.

Ten years later, Big Boss is running an independent military unit in Columbia, when he is visited by two individuals from Costa Rica, a country without a military.

In a post-Cuban Missile Crisis world, and in a Central America essential to maintaining the power balance between East and West, Costa Rica has been miraculously able to maintain peace.
However, a mysterious armed group has been seen acting suspiciously throughout the region.

They request Big Boss to investigate and eliminate the armed group.
Though he hesitates to accept the request because the tape they brought contained the voice of The Boss, who was supposed to be dead.

【System】
This title offers not only thrilling solo infiltration missions but also co-op with “SENYU” via online connections, and competitive multiplayer for up to six players.

The offshore facility Mother Base supports your missions.

It houses staff living quarters, development labs for mission weapons and gear, storage for captured large-scale weapons, and more. Expanding your staff allows Mother Base to grow and develop, incorporating simulation elements.

----------
The Screenplay Book containing in-game text from Metal Gear Solid: Peace Walker and the Master Book detailing the story and characters are also included within the game.

70010000094826.description:
Learn a dozen abilities, each more amazing than the last!
■ STICKY HONEY - Spread honey on your face to stick to objects and climb walls
■ POWERFUL CHOCOLATE - Use hardened chocolate to break obstacles

A piece of cake?!
■ VACATIONS GONE WRONG - Welcome to the Jam Session Cruise! Lucky you, you just happened to stumble across a ticket for a lovely vacation at sea! At least, until you discover that this boat can barely float!
■ DELICIOUSLY SWEET LEVELS - Explore dozens of levels and find huge candies to fuel the boat. From fruity cakes to tropical jungles to haunted floating islands (and more!), get bready for some tasty sights!
■ FRIENDLY TOASTS EVERYWHERE - You're not alone on this cruise; lots of other toasts are along for the ride! Get to know them: they’ve all got a good reason for being there. Maybe you can help them?
■ NEO-RETRO GAMEPLAY - Got a taste for platformers? Discover this toast's original moveset: slap, aerial dash, French toast (absorb and spit out liquid!!)... No spoilers, we'll stop the list here...
■ TONS OF COLLECTIBLES - Like collecting lots of shiny little things? You’re going to loaf it! Reach for the stars with 100% completion!!!
■ CHALLENGES FOR THE BRAVE - Want to give yourself a slice of hard mode? This cruise has some nice surprises in store! But don't panic, all these challenges are optional.
70010000094826.intro: Pardon My French Toast is a 3D platformer starring a slice of toast who covers himself in sweet spreads to get fun abilities.
70010000094826.name: Pardon My French Toast

70010000107436.description:
A strange melody has swept across Palombia… and all the animals have suddenly started dancing, leaving chaos in their wake! The creature behind this crazy beat is none other than the Mummy Queen, back from the Land of the Dead with her minions to play a cursed concert with a calamitous crescendo.

Help the Marsupilamis save Palombia from the Mummy Queen and her minions! 

A Fast-Paced 2D Platformer
Journey through four vibrant worlds in this high-energy platformer!
From the colourful jungle to the bustling city, find the clues to the Mummy Queen's hideout. Take on increasingly more intense challenges leading to the ultimate showdown against the Mummy Queen. 

3 Marsupilamis, 3 Abilities
Master the unique abilities of each Marsupilami. Switch characters to soar through the air, punch enemies, or leap across obstacles, and explore the different levels' secrets. Choose your Marsupilami wisely, and you might uncover a hidden level!

Experience the Adventure Together in Local Co-Op
Play the adventure with a friend or on your own and take on the Battle Dojos' challenges and the competitive minigames designed for friendly rivalries.

Dive Into a Vibrant, Colourful Universe Faithful to the Marsupilami Licence
Explore unforgettable environments, face memorable bosses, and uncover hidden levels, all set within a fast-paced, fun atmosphere for the whole family.
70010000107436.intro: Will you be able to follow the rhythm… or fall victim to the cursed dance?
70010000107436.name: Marsupilami 2 - Salsa Palombia

70010000101703.description:
Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is a classic-style graphic adventure about a person adrift in space who is rescued by a luxurious space station orbiting Mars. Playing as River, you'll immerse yourself in a world of comfort and pleasure—until you realize the station hides a dark secret.

In Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River, you'll navigate the station's lavish leisure facilities, using your wits to solve puzzles and move forward. As the story unfolds, you’ll begin to uncover the sinister side of the station and must choose whether to ignore it or take action.

The choices you make in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River will challenge your ethics and test your morality. Will you do whatever it takes to protect yourself and survive, or risk everything to expose the truth and stop what's happening on board?

The game's pixel art style creates a stunning, immersive world that captures the spirit of classic adventure games. From the luxurious amenities to the station’s shadowy corners, every location in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is full of character and ready to be explored. Its gripping story will keep you on the edge of your seat. With multiple endings to discover, this is a game you'll want to replay.

Are you ready to embark on a journey of self-discovery and uncover the dark secrets of the space station orbiting Mars?
70010000101703.intro: Uncover the dark truth behind a luxury space station orbiting Mars.
70010000101703.name: Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River

70010000115744.description:
Farming Camp is a cozy, single-player farm management game that follows the journey of an ambitious teenager competing to become the best farmer in the camp. Manage your farm alongside your companions, complete chores for points, and deal with the dynamics of a colorful cast in their teenage years. 

Your path to farming greatness begins!
Step into the boots of young Alessandra, before she became the renowned Evertree Farmer. Experience her life at the Evertree Farming Camp where it all began. Learn the ropes and face the fun and chaos of camp life.

Team up with a lively farming crew
You're not alone on the farm. You’ll have the company of two budding young farmers, each with their own vibe. Assign chores, solve problems, and build friendships as you figure out how to run the farm together.

Heart, humor, and harvests!
Farming’s only half the fun at Evertree Farming Camp. From delightful dramas to silly surprises, and even a few messy moments, there's never a dull day at the camp!

Work hard to take care of the camp
Use the tools at your disposal and climb your way to the top as the camp’s best farming team. Coordinate with your companions and earn points by completing chores, maintaining the camp, attending classes, and tackling missions.  

Have fun and win the competition
Jump into quick and fun minigames that keep things exciting—whether it’s racing against the clock to eliminate pests, chopping wood, cooking delicious meals, and more!

Key Features:
- Embark on a cozy single-player farming adventure and follow a unique, captivating story. 
- Explore a beautifully hand-drawn 2D top-down world full of charming details. 
- Meet a diverse and lovable cast of characters, each with their own quirks, stories, and farming talents. 
- Grow a variety of crops, care for animals, fish, and make your team win the competition.
- Keep your farm thriving with fun and engaging mini-games.
70010000115744.intro: Follow the journey of Alessandra competing to become the best farmer in the camp.
70010000115744.name: Farming Camp

70010000093187.description:
The Cat in the Hat once said, “It is fun to have fun, but you have to know how.” 

Everyone from the mischievous Dr. Seuss classic is here. Become smart and steady Sally, energetic wild card Johnny, cause double the trouble as Thing 1 & Thing 2 or be cheerful Little Cat A. And of course, the chaos conductor, The Cat in the Hat and anxiously wise Fish will be there to help, on this zany ride. 

Play solo or go against your friends, choosing from two trick-filled game modes. Fancy a game of chase? Then ‘Find the Cat’ will have you turning the house upside down looking for The Cat in the Hat. Or maybe you prefer getting into chaotic challenges? See how quickly you can capture penguins, decorate a cake, and who knows what else in the 18 minigames you can choose from.  

But the fun doesn’t stop there, just like The Cat’s hat, it’ll be full of tricks. With varying difficulty levels, long challenges and short, there’s something for everyone. 

Get ready for your house to be filled with giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem.  

ELEVATE YOUR GAME NIGHT: Dive into the mayhem solo or race to the end with up to 4 players.  

CLASSIC DR. SEUSS CHARACTERS: Play as Sally, Johnny, Thing 1 & Thing 2 and Little Cat. 

CHOOSE YOUR MODE FOR NON-STOP FUN: Pick from 18 entertaining minigames or find The Cat across 14 rooms. 

BOUNCE, CHASE & PAINT TO WIN: Compete for rewards. Will you find all the stickers for your book? 

A PARTY FOR ALL AGES: Re-play in different ways, with easy controls and varying difficulties.
70010000093187.intro: Join your favorite Dr. Seuss characters in 18 exciting minigames and challenges. Your house is about to be full of giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem.
70010000093187.name: The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem

70010000096680.description:
A vibrant sci-fi platform adventure game for the Nintendo Switch™, where you help Maxwell the dog explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces - by jumping, shooting, slicing, shrinking, warping and drilling.

Maxwell’s homeworld is nearing collapse. In a last ditch-effort to find help, he hyperjumps where no dog has gone before. Stranded, he finds himself on the edge of a hostile system - if there’s any hope of return and rescue he’ll need every friend (and every weapon) he can find.

Forced to confront this celestial expanse head on, Maxwell stays strong - determined to keep his head up and lend a helping hand to everyone he meets on his journey. Like all underdogs, the odds are stacked against him, but you can’t keep a good dog down.

Key Features
· Explore jam-packed levels with multiple routes
· Make 50+ friends & collect their friendship cards
· Upgrade your blaster with special abilities
· Find hidden areas and take on a variety of boss battles
· Local couch co-op multiplayer mode
· Bonus prequel content: Chapter Zero
70010000096680.intro: Help Maxwell explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces.
70010000096680.name: Goodboy Galaxy

70050000070556.description:
Frightful Night

The holidays arrive in Ghost Master Resurrection with a new Christmas Market level, draped in lights, decorations, and false cheer. Mortals gather to celebrate, laugh, and shop—blissfully unaware that terror awaits just beneath the tinsel.

Carols echo. Shadows linger.

Every smile hides a scream.

The most wonderful time of the year is here—for you to scare!
70050000070556.name: Frightful Night
